1418 |         {
1419 |             Id = id,
1420 |             Name = name,
1421 |             Description = description,
1422 |             Category = category,
1423 |             Weight = weight,
1424 |             Value = value,
1425 |             Rarity = rarity,
1426 |             Stackable = false,
1427 |             Weapon = weapon,
1428 |         };
1429 |         world.Registries.Items.Register(tpl);
1430 |         return ToolResult.Ok(string.Empty, $"Создан шаблон предмета «{name}» (id: {id}).");
1431 |     };

1433 | 
1434 | // ─── Combat state machine + death-save tools (issue #88, #63) ────────────
1435 | 
1436 | /// <summary>
1437 | /// Start structured combat: collect the player + every alive hostile NPC at
1438 | /// the player's current location, roll initiative for each (d20 + DEX
1439 | /// modifier), sort descending, and install the result on
1440 | /// <see cref="World.Combat"/>. The GM is then expected to call
1441 | /// <c>next_turn</c> after each combatant's action.
1442 | /// </summary>
1443 | internal static class StartCombatTool
1444 | {
1445 |     public static ToolDefinition Definition { get; } = new()
1446 |     {
1447 |         Name = "start_combat",
1448 |         Description = "Начать структурный бой: игрок + все живые враждебные NPC в текущей локации. Бросает инициативу (d20 + модификатор ЛОВ), сортирует по убыванию. Вызывай в начале боя и затем next_turn после каждого действия.",
1449 |         ParametersJson = """
1450 |         { "type": "object", "properties": {} }
1451 |         """,
1452 |     };
1453 | 
1454 |     public static ToolHandler Handle(MyGame.Core.World.World world) => async (args, ct) =>
1455 |     {
1456 |         var p = world.ActivePlayer ?? world.Players.FirstOrDefault();
1457 |         if (p is null)
1458 |             return ToolResult.Error(string.Empty, "В мире ещё нет игрока.");
1459 | 
1460 |         // Combatants: the player + every alive NPC at the player's
1461 |         // location whose Disposition is "hostile" (case-insensitive). If
1462 |         // no hostiles are present, we still start combat (the GM may
1463 |         // want initiative pre-rolled for an about-to-ambush), but warn
1464 |         // in the result text.
1465 |         var loc = world.GetLocation(p.LocationId);
1466 |         var hostiles = loc?.Npcs
1467 |             .Select(id => world.GetNpc(id))
1468 |             .Where(n => n is not null && n.IsAlive &&
1469 |                 string.Equals(n.Disposition, "hostile", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase))
1470 |             .ToList() ?? new();
1471 | 
1472 |         var combatants = new List<Combatant>();
1473 | 
1474 |         // Player's initiative: d20 + DEX modifier (from Attributes["dex"];
1475 |         // default 10 → modifier 0 when missing). The modifier is computed
1476 |         // via the ruleset's AttributeModifier formula (so non-D&D
1477 |         // rulesets can plug in their own DEX-equivalent).
1478 |         int playerInit = D20.Roll(world.Rng, 20) + GetDexModifier(world, p);
1479 |         combatants.Add(new Combatant(p.Id, p.Name, playerInit, HasActedThisRound: false));
1480 | 
1481 |         foreach (var n in hostiles!)
1482 |         {
1483 |             int init = D20.Roll(world.Rng, 20) + GetDexModifier(world, n!);
1484 |             combatants.Add(new Combatant(n!.Id, n.Name, init, HasActedThisRound: false));
1485 |         }
1486 | 
1487 |         // Sort descending by initiative. Stable order preserves player-
1488 |         // first tie-break (the player was added first), so on a tie the
1489 |         // player goes before NPCs — the friendly default for a single-
1490 |         // player CRPG.
1491 |         combatants = combatants
1492 |             .Select((c, idx) => (c, idx))
1493 |             .OrderByDescending(x => x.c.Initiative)
1494 |             .ThenBy(x => x.idx)
1495 |             .Select(x => x.c)
1496 |             .ToList();
1497 | 
1498 |         world.Combat = new CombatState
1499 |         {
1500 |             Active = true,
1501 |             Round = 1,
1502 |             TurnOrder = combatants,
1503 |             CurrentActorIndex = 0,
1504 |             StartedAtTurn = world.Turn,
1505 |         };
1506 | 
1507 |         // Mark the first actor as having acted this round so the GM knows
1508 |         // the current actor is "live" — the next_turn call will advance
1509 |         // to the next combatant. (The flag is informational; the GM is
1510 |         // expected to call next_turn after each action regardless.)
1511 |         if (combatants.Count > 0)
1512 |             combatants[0] = combatants[0] with { HasActedThisRound = true };
1513 | 
1514 |         var order = string.Join(", ", combatants.Select(c => $"{c.Name} ({c.Initiative})"));
1515 |         var text = $"Бой начался! Инициатива: {order}.";
1516 |         if (hostiles.Count == 0)
1517 |             text += " (Враждебных NPC в локации не найдено — бой объявлен, но возможно ожидается засада.)";
1518 |         return ToolResult.Ok(string.Empty, text);
1519 |     };
1520 | 
1521 |     /// <summary>
1522 |     /// Get the DEX modifier for a character: looks up Attributes["dex"]
1523 |     /// (default 10), then applies the ruleset's modifier formula
1524 |     /// (<c>floor((v-10)/2)</c> for the default D&amp;D ruleset). Returns
1525 |     /// 0 when the attribute is missing or the ruleset doesn't define a
1526 |     /// modifier formula. Internal so the other combat tools can reuse it.
1527 |     /// </summary>
1528 |     internal static int GetDexModifier(MyGame.Core.World.World world, Character c)
1529 |     {
1530 |         int dexVal = c.Attributes.TryGetValue("dex", out var dv) ? dv : 10;
1531 |         return (int)Rulesets.AttributeModifier(world.Ruleset, "dex", dexVal);
1532 |     }
1533 | }
1534 | 
1535 | /// <summary>
1536 | /// End combat immediately: clear <see cref="World.Combat"/>. The GM calls
1537 | /// this when the fight is over (everyone surrendered, fled, or died). The
1538 | /// deal_damage tool also auto-calls this when only the player remains in
1539 | /// the turn order.
1540 | /// </summary>
1541 | internal static class EndCombatTool
1542 | {
1543 |     public static ToolDefinition Definition { get; } = new()
1544 |     {
1545 |         Name = "end_combat",
1546 |         Description = "Завершить структурный бой (сбрасывает состояние боя). Вызывай, когда бой окончен: все противники побеждены, разбежались или сдались.",
1547 |         ParametersJson = """
1548 |         { "type": "object", "properties": {} }
1549 |         """,
1550 |     };
1551 | 
1552 |     public static ToolHandler Handle(MyGame.Core.World.World world) => async (args, ct) =>
1553 |     {
1554 |         bool wasActive = world.Combat is { Active: true };
1555 |         world.Combat = null;
1556 |         return ToolResult.Ok(string.Empty, wasActive ? "Бой окончен." : "Бой не был активен.");
1557 |     };
1558 | }
1559 | 
1560 | /// <summary>
1561 | /// Advance to the next combatant's turn. Wraps around at the end of the
1562 | /// turn order (incrementing <see cref="CombatState.Round"/> and resetting
1563 | /// all <see cref="Combatant.HasActedThisRound"/> flags). The new current
1564 | /// actor is marked as having acted this round.
1565 | /// </summary>
1566 | internal static class NextTurnTool
1567 | {
1568 |     public static ToolDefinition Definition { get; } = new()
1569 |     {
1570 |         Name = "next_turn",
1571 |         Description = "Передать ход следующему бойцу в инициативе. В конце раунда начинает новый раунд. Вызывай после каждого действия в бою.",
1572 |         ParametersJson = """
1573 |         { "type": "object", "properties": {} }
1574 |         """,
1575 |     };
1576 | 
1577 |     public static ToolHandler Handle(MyGame.Core.World.World world) => async (args, ct) =>
1578 |     {
1579 |         if (world.Combat is not { Active: true } combat)
1580 |             return ToolResult.Error(string.Empty, "Бой не активен. Сначала вызови start_combat.");
1581 |         if (combat.TurnOrder.Count == 0)
1582 |             return ToolResult.Error(string.Empty, "Очередь боя пуста.");
1583 | 
1584 |         combat.CurrentActorIndex++;
1585 |         if (combat.CurrentActorIndex >= combat.TurnOrder.Count)
1586 |         {
1587 |             combat.CurrentActorIndex = 0;
1588 |             combat.Round++;
1589 |             // Reset the HasActedThisRound flag for every combatant at
1590 |             // the start of a new round. Combatant is a record, so we
1591 |             // rebuild the list with new values.
1592 |             combat.TurnOrder = combat.TurnOrder
1593 |                 .Select(c => c with { HasActedThisRound = false })
1594 |                 .ToList();
1595 |         }
1596 | 
1597 |         var current = combat.TurnOrder[combat.CurrentActorIndex];
1598 |         combat.TurnOrder[combat.CurrentActorIndex] = current with { HasActedThisRound = true };
1599 | 
1600 |         return ToolResult.Ok(string.Empty,
1601 |             $"Раунд {combat.Round}. Ход: {current.Name}.");
1602 |     };
1603 | }
1604 | 
1605 | /// <summary>
1606 | /// Roll a death save for the active player. Tracks successes / failures
1607 | /// in <c>World.Flags["deathSaves"]</c> as <c>"S,F"</c> (0-3 each).
1608 | ///
1609 | /// <list type="bullet">
1610 | ///   <item>Natural 20: regain 1 HP, conscious, saves reset.</item>
1611 | ///   <item>Natural 1: 2 failures.</item>
1612 | ///   <item>10-19: 1 success.</item>
1613 | ///   <item>2-9: 1 failure.</item>
1614 | ///   <item>3 successes: stable (HP stays 0, no more saves needed).</item>
1615 | ///   <item>3 failures: <see cref="Character.IsAlive"/> = false — the player
1616 | ///     is dead.</item>
1617 | /// </list>
1618 | /// </summary>
1619 | internal static class DeathSaveTool
1620 | {
1621 |     public static ToolDefinition Definition { get; } = new()
1622 |     {
1623 |         Name = "death_save",
1624 |         Description = "Спасбросок от смерти для игрока (d20). 10+ = успех, &lt;10 = провал, natural 20 = +1 HP и сознание, natural 1 = 2 провала. 3 успеха = стабилен, 3 провала = смерть. Вызывай каждый ход, пока игрок на 0 HP.",
1625 |         ParametersJson = """
1626 |         { "type": "object", "properties": {} }
1627 |         """,
1628 |     };
1629 | 
1630 |     public static ToolHandler Handle(MyGame.Core.World.World world) => async (args, ct) =>
1631 |     {
1632 |         var p = world.ActivePlayer ?? world.Players.FirstOrDefault();
1633 |         if (p is null)
1634 |             return ToolResult.Error(string.Empty, "В мире ещё нет игрока.");
1635 | 
1636 |         // The player must be at 0 HP for a death save to make sense.
1637 |         // (We tolerate missing 'hp' — treat as 0 — so a freshly-reduced
1638 |         // player can be saved without a deal_damage call first.)
1639 |         int hp = p.Resources.TryGetValue("hp", out var hpVal) ? hpVal : 0;
1640 |         if (hp > 0)
1641 |             return ToolResult.Error(string.Empty,
1642 |                 $"Игрок «{p.Name}» не на 0 HP (текущий HP: {hp}) — спасбросок не нужен.");
1643 | 
1644 |         world.Flags ??= new Dictionary<string, object>();
1645 |         var (successes, failures) = ReadDeathSaves(world.Flags);
1646 | 
1647 |         int roll = D20.Roll(world.Rng, 20);
1648 | 
1649 |         int successDelta = 0;
1650 |         int failureDelta = 0;
1651 |         string specialNote = "";
1652 | 
1653 |         if (roll == 20)
1654 |         {
1655 |             // Natural 20: regain 1 HP, become conscious, reset saves.
1656 |             p.Resources["hp"] = 1;
1657 |             successes = 0;
1658 |             failures = 0;
1659 |             specialNote = "Natural 20! Игрок приходит в сознание с 1 HP.";
1660 |         }
1661 |         else if (roll == 1)
1662 |         {
1663 |             // Natural 1: 2 failures.
1664 |             failureDelta = 2;
1665 |             specialNote = "Natural 1! Два провала.";
1666 |         }
1667 |         else if (roll >= 10)
1668 |         {
1669 |             successDelta = 1;
1670 |         }
1671 |         else
1672 |         {
1673 |             failureDelta = 1;
1674 |         }
1675 | 
1676 |         successes = Math.Min(3, successes + successDelta);
1677 |         failures = Math.Min(3, failures + failureDelta);
1678 | 
1679 |         // 3 failures → dead. 3 successes → stable (HP stays 0, no more
1680 |         // saves needed; clears the deathSaves flag so a subsequent
1681 |         // heal-and-drop-to-0 starts fresh).
1682 |         bool died = false;
1683 |         bool stabilized = false;
1684 |         if (failures >= 3 && roll != 20)
1685 |         {
1686 |             p.IsAlive = false;
1687 |             died = true;
1688 |             world.Flags.Remove("deathSaves");
1689 |         }
1690 |         else if (successes >= 3 && roll != 20)
1691 |         {
1692 |             stabilized = true;
1693 |             world.Flags["deathSaves"] = "3,0";
1694 |         }
1695 |         else if (roll != 20)
1696 |         {
1697 |             world.Flags["deathSaves"] = $"{successes},{failures}";
1698 |         }
1699 |         else
1700 |         {
1701 |             // Natural 20 cleared the flag above implicitly (saves reset).
1702 |             // Make sure it's not lingering from a previous turn.
1703 |             world.Flags.Remove("deathSaves");
1704 |         }
1705 | 
1706 |         var sb = new System.Text.StringBuilder();
1707 |         sb.Append($"Спасбросок от смерти: d20={roll}. ");
1708 |         if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(specialNote))
1709 |             sb.Append($"{specialNote} ");
1710 |         sb.Append($"Успехи: {successes}/3, Провалы: {failures}/3.");
1711 |         if (died)
1712 |             sb.Append(" Игрок погиб!");
1713 |         else if (stabilized)
1714 |             sb.Append(" Игрок стабилизирован (больше спасбросков не нужно).");
1715 |         return ToolResult.Ok(string.Empty, sb.ToString().Trim());
1716 |     };
1717 | 
1718 |     /// <summary>
1719 |     /// Parse the <c>deathSaves</c> flag (<c>"S,F"</c>) into a tuple.
1720 |     /// Missing / malformed → (0, 0). Internal so other tools / the UI
1721 |     /// can read the same state.
1722 |     /// </summary>
1723 |     internal static (int Successes, int Failures) ReadDeathSaves(
1724 |         Dictionary<string, object> flags)
1725 |     {
1726 |         if (!flags.TryGetValue("deathSaves", out var v) || v is null)
1727 |             return (0, 0);
1728 |         var s = v.ToString() ?? "";
1729 |         var parts = s.Split(',', StringSplitOptions.TrimEntries);
1730 |         if (parts.Length != 2) return (0, 0);
1731 |         if (!int.TryParse(parts[0], out var suc)) suc = 0;
1732 |         if (!int.TryParse(parts[1], out var fail)) fail = 0;
1733 |         return (Math.Clamp(suc, 0, 3), Math.Clamp(fail, 0, 3));
1734 |     }
1735 | }
1736 | 
1737 | // ─── Dice expression evaluator ───────────────────────────────────────────
1738 | 
1739 | /// <summary>
1740 | /// Tiny <c>NdM±K</c> dice-expression evaluator used by the
1741 | /// <see cref="RollDiceTool"/>. The TS source had a full
1742 | /// <c>rollExpression</c> in <c>engine/rules/d20.ts</c>; this C# port is a
1743 | /// minimal regex-based version that handles the common cases
1744 | /// (<c>1d20</c>, <c>2d6+3</c>, <c>3d8-1</c>, <c>d100</c>, bare constants
1745 | /// like <c>5</c>). It returns (total, rolls[], modifier) so the tool can
1746 | /// render a faithful «кости [...] +K = total» line.
1747 | /// </summary>
1748 | internal static class DiceExpressionEvaluator
1749 | {
1750 |     private static readonly Regex s_pattern = new(
1751 |         @"^(?<count>\d*)d(?<sides>\d+)(?<mod>[+-]\d+)?$",
1752 |         RegexOptions.Compiled | RegexOptions.IgnoreCase);
1753 | 
1754 |     public static (int Total, IReadOnlyList<int> Rolls, int Modifier) Eval(Rng rng, string expression)
1755 |     {
1756 |         if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(expression))
1757 |             return (0, Array.Empty<int>(), 0);
1758 | 
1759 |         // Bare integer ("5") — just return it.
1760 |         if (int.TryParse(expression, NumberStyles.Integer, CultureInfo.InvariantCulture, out var bare))
1761 |             return (bare, Array.Empty<int>(), 0);
1762 | 
1763 |         var m = s_pattern.Match(expression.Trim());
1764 |         if (!m.Success)
1765 |             return (0, Array.Empty<int>(), 0);
1766 | 
1767 |         var count = int.TryParse(m.Groups["count"].Value, NumberStyles.Integer, CultureInfo.InvariantCulture, out var c) && c > 0 ? c : 1;
1768 |         var sides = int.TryParse(m.Groups["sides"].Value, NumberStyles.Integer, CultureInfo.InvariantCulture, out var s) && s > 0 ? s : 1;
1769 |         var mod = 0;
1770 |         if (m.Groups["mod"].Success && int.TryParse(m.Groups["mod"].ValueSpan, NumberStyles.Integer, CultureInfo.InvariantCulture, out var mm))
1771 |             mod = mm;
1772 | 
1773 |         // Cap count to avoid pathological inputs (the model occasionally
1774 |         // emits "1000d6" — we treat anything over 100 dice as 100).
1775 |         if (count > 100) count = 100;
1776 |         // Cap sides too — a d1000000 would overflow on a long run.
1777 |         if (sides > 1000) sides = 1000;
1778 | 
1779 |         var rolls = new int[count];
1780 |         int sum = 0;
1781 |         for (int i = 0; i < count; i++)
1782 |         {
1783 |             rolls[i] = rng.NextInt(1, sides + 1);
1784 |             sum += rolls[i];
1785 |         }
1786 |         return (sum + mod, rolls, mod);
1787 |     }
1788 | }
1789 | 
1790 | // ─── Runtime content authoring: NPC + building templates ───────────────
1791 | // (create_item_template already exists above; these two mirror it for NPCs
1792 | //  and buildings, letting the GM invent new entity types mid-game without
1793 | //  a world rebuild. Useful for AI-generated worlds where the planner may
1794 | //  not have anticipated every entity the GM needs.)
1795 | 
1796 | /// <summary>
1797 | /// Register a custom NPC template at runtime. The GM can then spawn_npc by
1798 | /// this new templateId. Lets the GM invent new NPCs mid-game (e.g. a unique
1799 | /// boss the planner didn't anticipate, a custom merchant with special stock).
1800 | /// </summary>
1801 | internal static class CreateNpcTemplateTool
1802 | {
1803 |     public static ToolDefinition Definition { get; } = new()
1804 |     {
1805 |         Name = "create_npc_template",
1806 |         Description = "Создать кастомный шаблон NPC в рантайме. После создания можно спавнить через spawn_npc с этим templateId. Используй для уникальных NPC (боссы, ключевые персонажи), которых не было в изначальном плане мира.",
1807 |         ParametersJson = """
1808 |         {
1809 |           "type": "object",
1810 |           "properties": {
1811 |             "id": { "type": "string", "description": "Уникальный ID, напр. npc_custom_bandit_chief" },
1812 |             "name": { "type": "string", "description": "Имя NPC." },
1813 |             "race": { "type": "string", "description": "Раса: human, elf, dwarf, orc, goblin, или кастомная." },
1814 |             "class": { "type": "string", "description": "Класс/роль: fighter, wizard, rogue, или кастомный." },
1815 |             "level": { "type": "integer", "description": "Уровень (1-20)." },
1816 |             "attributes": { "type": "object", "description": "Характеристики: {str, dex, con, int, wis, cha}." },
1817 |             "resources": { "type": "object", "description": "Ресурсы: {hp, ac}." },
1818 |             "disposition": { "type": "string", "description": "Расположение: friendly, neutral, hostile, allied." },
1819 |             "behavior": { "type": "string", "description": "Подсказка GM: как NPC себя ведёт в бою/диалоге." },
1820 |             "description": { "type": "string", "description": "Атмосферное описание NPC." }
1821 |           },
1822 |           "required": ["id", "name", "race", "class", "level", "attributes", "disposition", "behavior", "description"]
1823 |         }
1824 |         """,
1825 |     };
1826 | 
1827 |     public static ToolHandler Handle(MyGame.Core.World.World world) => async (args, ct) =>
1828 |     {
1829 |         var id = args.TryGetProperty("id", out var idEl) ? idEl.GetString() ?? "" : "";
1830 |         if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(id))
1831 |             return ToolResult.Error(string.Empty, "Параметр id обязателен.");
1832 | 
1833 |         var name = args.TryGetProperty("name", out var nEl) ? nEl.GetString() ?? "" : "";
1834 |         var race = args.TryGetProperty("race", out var rEl) ? rEl.GetString() ?? "human" : "human";
1835 |         var cls = args.TryGetProperty("class", out var cEl) ? cEl.GetString() ?? "fighter" : "fighter";
1836 |         var level = args.TryGetProperty("level", out var lEl) && lEl.TryGetInt32(out var lv) ? lv : 1;
1837 |         var disposition = args.TryGetProperty("disposition", out var dEl) ? dEl.GetString() ?? "neutral" : "neutral";
1838 |         var behavior = args.TryGetProperty("behavior", out var bEl) ? bEl.GetString() ?? "" : "";
1839 |         var description = args.TryGetProperty("description", out var descEl) ? descEl.GetString() ?? "" : "";
1840 | 
1841 |         var attributes = new Dictionary<string, int>();
1842 |         if (args.TryGetProperty("attributes", out var aEl) && aEl.ValueKind == JsonValueKind.Object)
1843 |         {
1844 |             foreach (var prop in aEl.EnumerateObject())
1845 |             {
1846 |                 if (prop.Value.TryGetInt32(out var val))
1847 |                     attributes[prop.Name] = val;
1848 |             }
1849 |         }
1850 | 
1851 |         var resources = new Dictionary<string, int>();
1852 |         if (args.TryGetProperty("resources", out var resEl) && resEl.ValueKind == JsonValueKind.Object)
1853 |         {
1854 |             foreach (var prop in resEl.EnumerateObject())
1855 |             {
1856 |                 if (prop.Value.TryGetInt32(out var val))
1857 |                     resources[prop.Name] = val;
1858 |             }
1859 |         }
1860 | 
1861 |         var tpl = new MyGame.Core.World.Content.NpcTemplate
1862 |         {
1863 |             Id = id,
1864 |             Name = name,
1865 |             Race = race,
1866 |             Class = cls,
1867 |             Level = level,
1868 |             Attributes = attributes,
1869 |             Resources = resources.Count > 0 ? resources : null,
1870 |             Disposition = disposition,
1871 |             Behavior = behavior,
1872 |             Description = description,
1873 |         };
1874 | 
1875 |         world.Registries.Npcs.Register(tpl);
1876 |         return ToolResult.Ok(string.Empty, $"Создан шаблон NPC «{name}» (id: {id}, раса: {race}, класс: {cls}, ур. {level}).");
1877 |     };
1878 | }

1930 | 
1931 | // ─── ENGINE-DEPTH: weather / factions / lore (issues #34 / #36 / #43) ─────
1932 | 
1933 | /// <summary>
1934 | /// Set the world's current weather (issue #34). Activates the weather
1935 | /// subsystem on worlds where it was null — once activated, the GM context
1936 | /// block surfaces the weather + its mechanical effects (travel time,
1937 | /// encounter chance, Perception disadvantage) to the model.
1938 | /// </summary>
1939 | internal static class SetWeatherTool
1940 | {
1941 |     // Canonical weather vocabulary. Keys are the lowercase English tags
1942 |     // the model emits; values are the RU display labels + emoji used by
1943 |     // the UI / GM context. Anything outside this set is rejected.
1944 |     internal static readonly IReadOnlyDictionary<string, string> WeatherLabels = new Dictionary<string, string>(StringComparer.Ordinal)
1945 |     {
1946 |         ["clear"] = "🌤 Ясно",
1947 |         ["rain"] = "🌧 Дождь",
1948 |         ["storm"] = "⛈ Гроза",
1949 |         ["fog"] = "🌫 Туман",
1950 |         ["snow"] = "❄ Снег",
1951 |         ["overcast"] = "☁ Облачно",
1952 |     };
1953 | 
1954 |     public static ToolDefinition Definition { get; } = new()
1955 |     {
1956 |         Name = "set_weather",
1957 |         Description = "Установить текущую погоду мира (clear/rain/storm/fog/snow/overcast) и опциональный прогноз. Активирует подсистему погоды — влияет на время путешествия, шанс случайных встреч, броски Внимательности.",
1958 |         ParametersJson = """
1959 |         {
1960 |           "type": "object",
1961 |           "properties": {
1962 |             "weather": { "type": "string", "description": "Тип погоды: clear | rain | storm | fog | snow | overcast." },
1963 |             "forecast": { "type": "string", "description": "Краткий прогноз на русском (опц., напр. «К вечеру ожидается гроза»)." }
1964 |           },
1965 |           "required": ["weather"]
1966 |         }
1967 |         """,
1968 |     };
1969 | 
1970 |     public static ToolHandler Handle(MyGame.Core.World.World world) => async (args, ct) =>
1971 |     {
1972 |         var weather = args.TryGetProperty("weather", out var wEl) ? wEl.GetString() ?? "" : "";
1973 |         if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(weather))
1974 |             return ToolResult.Error(string.Empty, "Параметр weather обязателен.");
1975 | 
1976 |         // Normalize to lowercase so model-emitted "Rain"/"RAIN" work too.
1977 |         weather = weather.Trim().ToLowerInvariant();
1978 |         if (!WeatherLabels.ContainsKey(weather))
1979 |         {
1980 |             var valid = string.Join(", ", WeatherLabels.Keys.OrderBy(k => k));
1981 |             return ToolResult.Error(string.Empty,
1982 |                 $"Неизвестная погода «{weather}». Допустимо: {valid}.");
1983 |         }
1984 | 
1985 |         var forecast = args.TryGetProperty("forecast", out var fEl) ? fEl.GetString() : null;
1986 |         if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(forecast)) forecast = null;
1987 | 
1988 |         world.CurrentWeather = weather;
1989 |         world.WeatherForecast = forecast;
1990 | 
1991 |         var label = WeatherLabels[weather];
1992 |         var text = forecast is null
1993 |             ? $"Погода: {label}."
1994 |             : $"Погода: {label}. Прогноз: {forecast}.";

2030 | /// <summary>
2031 | /// Adjust a faction's reputation with the player (issue #36). Clamps to
2032 | /// [-100, 100] and recomputes the alignment bucket (ally / neutral /
2033 | /// hostile) so callers always see a consistent pair.
2034 | /// </summary>
2035 | internal static class AdjustReputationTool
2036 | {
2037 |     public static ToolDefinition Definition { get; } = new()
2038 |     {
2039 |         Name = "adjust_reputation",
2040 |         Description = "Изменить репутацию фракции с игроком на delta (может быть отрицательной). Зажимает в [-100, 100] и пересчитывает выравнивание (>=30 ally, <=-30 hostile, иначе neutral).",
2041 |         ParametersJson = """
2042 |         {
2043 |           "type": "object",
2044 |           "properties": {
2045 |             "factionName": { "type": "string", "description": "Имя фракции (как в плане мира)." },
2046 |             "delta": { "type": "integer", "description": "Изменение репутации (может быть отрицательным)." }
2047 |           },
2048 |           "required": ["factionName", "delta"]
2049 |         }
2050 |         """,
2051 |     };
2052 | 
2053 |     public static ToolHandler Handle(MyGame.Core.World.World world) => async (args, ct) =>
2054 |     {
2055 |         var name = args.TryGetProperty("factionName", out var nEl) ? nEl.GetString() ?? "" : "";
2056 |         if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(name))
2057 |             return ToolResult.Error(string.Empty, "Параметр factionName обязателен.");
2058 | 
2059 |         if (!args.TryGetProperty("delta", out var dEl) || !dEl.TryGetInt32(out var delta))
2060 |             return ToolResult.Error(string.Empty, "Параметр delta обязателен и должен быть целым числом.");
2061 | 
2062 |         var faction = world.Factions.FirstOrDefault(f =>
2063 |             string.Equals(f.Name, name, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase));
2064 |         if (faction is null)
2065 |         {
2066 |             var known = world.Factions.Count > 0
2067 |                 ? string.Join(", ", world.Factions.Select(f => $"«{f.Name}»").OrderBy(s => s))
2068 |                 : "(нет фракций)";
2069 |             return ToolResult.Error(string.Empty,
2070 |                 $"Фракция «{name}» не найдена. Доступные: {known}.");
2071 |         }
2072 | 
2073 |         faction.Reputation = Math.Clamp(faction.Reputation + delta, -100, 100);
2074 |         faction.RecomputeAlignment();
2075 |         return ToolResult.Ok(string.Empty,
2076 |             $"Репутация фракции «{faction.Name}»: {faction.Reputation} ({faction.Alignment}).");
2077 |     };

2155 | // ─── Economy + crafting + containers (issues #37, #65, #67) ───────────
2156 | 
2157 | /// <summary>
2158 | /// Craft an item from a recipe. Consumes input items from the player's
2159 | /// inventory, produces the output item. Issue #65.
2160 | /// </summary>
2161 | internal static class CraftItemTool
2162 | {
2163 |     public static ToolDefinition Definition { get; } = new()
2164 |     {
2165 |         Name = "craft_item",
2166 |         Description = "Скрафтить предмет по рецепту. Проверяет наличие ингредиентов в инвентаре игрока, потребляет их, создаёт результат. Если нужен навык — GM должен сначала сделать бросок.",
2167 |         ParametersJson = """
2168 |         {
2169 |           "type": "object",
2170 |           "properties": {
2171 |             "recipeId": { "type": "string", "description": "ID рецепта, напр. craft_health_potion." }
2172 |           },
2173 |           "required": ["recipeId"]
2174 |         }
2175 |         """,
2176 |     };
2177 | 
2178 |     public static ToolHandler Handle(MyGame.Core.World.World world) => async (args, ct) =>
2179 |     {
2180 |         var recipeId = args.TryGetProperty("recipeId", out var rEl) ? rEl.GetString() ?? "" : "";
2181 |         if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(recipeId))
2182 |             return ToolResult.Error(string.Empty, "Параметр recipeId обязателен.");
2183 | 
2184 |         var recipe = world.Registries.Recipes.Get(recipeId);
2185 |         if (recipe is null)
2186 |             return ToolResult.Error(string.Empty, $"Рецепт «{recipeId}» не найден. Доступные: {string.Join(", ", world.Registries.Recipes.All().Select(r => r.Id).Take(20))}.");
2187 | 
2188 |         var player = world.ActivePlayer ?? world.Players.FirstOrDefault();
2189 |         if (player is null)
2190 |             return ToolResult.Error(string.Empty, "Игрок не найден.");
2191 | 
2192 |         // Check inputs.
2193 |         foreach (var (inputId, requiredQty) in recipe.Inputs)
2194 |         {
2195 |             var have = player.Inventory.Items
2196 |                 .Where(i => i.TemplateId == inputId)
2197 |             #pragma warning disable CA1829
2198 |                 .Aggregate(0, (sum, i) => sum + i.Quantity);
2199 |             #pragma warning restore CA1829
2200 |             if (have < requiredQty)
2201 |                 return ToolResult.Error(string.Empty, $"Недостаточно «{inputId}»: нужно {requiredQty}, есть {have}.");
2202 |         }
2203 | 
2204 |         // Check required tool.
2205 |         if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(recipe.RequiredTool))
2206 |         {
2207 |             var hasTool = player.Inventory.Items.Any(i => i.TemplateId == recipe.RequiredTool)
2208 |                 || player.Equipped.Values.Any(i => i.TemplateId == recipe.RequiredTool);
2209 |             if (!hasTool)
2210 |                 return ToolResult.Error(string.Empty, $"Нужен инструмент: {recipe.RequiredTool}.");
2211 |         }
2212 | 
2213 |         // Consume inputs.
2214 |         foreach (var (inputId, requiredQty) in recipe.Inputs)
2215 |         {
2216 |             var remaining = requiredQty;
2217 |             for (int i = player.Inventory.Items.Count - 1; i >= 0 && remaining > 0; i--)
2218 |             {
2219 |                 var item = player.Inventory.Items[i];
2220 |                 if (item.TemplateId != inputId) continue;
2221 |                 if (item.Quantity <= remaining)
2222 |                 {
2223 |                     remaining -= item.Quantity;
2224 |                     player.Inventory.Items.RemoveAt(i);
2225 |                 }
2226 |                 else
2227 |                 {
2228 |                     item.Quantity -= remaining;
2229 |                     remaining = 0;
2230 |                 }
2231 |             }
2232 |         }
2233 | 
2234 |         // Produce output.
2235 |         var outputTpl = world.Registries.Items.Get(recipe.OutputTemplateId);
2236 |         if (outputTpl is null)
2237 |             return ToolResult.Error(string.Empty, $"Выходной шаблон «{recipe.OutputTemplateId}» не найден.");
2238 | 
2239 |         var output = MyGame.Core.World.EntityFactory.InstantiateItem(outputTpl, recipe.OutputQuantity);
2240 |         player.Inventory.Items.Add(output);
2241 | 
2242 |         return ToolResult.Ok(string.Empty, $"Скрафчен «{outputTpl.Name}» ×{recipe.OutputQuantity} из рецепта «{recipe.Name}».");
2243 |     };
2244 | }
2245 | 
2246 | /// <summary>
2247 | /// Search the current location for items on the ground. Returns a list
2248 | /// of ground items that the player can pick up. Issue #67 (containers/looting).
2249 | /// </summary>
2250 | internal static class SearchLocationTool
2251 | {
2252 |     public static ToolDefinition Definition { get; } = new()
2253 |     {
2254 |         Name = "search_location",
2255 |         Description = "Обыскать текущую локацию. Возвращает список предметов на земле, трупы с инвентарём, и возможные контейнеры (сундуки, ящики).",
2256 |         ParametersJson = """
2257 |         {
2258 |           "type": "object",
2259 |           "properties": {
2260 |             "locationId": { "type": "string", "description": "Локация (ID или имя); пусто = текущая." }
2261 |           }
2262 |         }
2263 |         """,
2264 |     };
2265 | 
2266 |     public static ToolHandler Handle(MyGame.Core.World.World world) => async (args, ct) =>
2267 |     {
2268 |         var idOrName = args.TryGetProperty("locationId", out var el) ? el.GetString() ?? "" : "";
2269 |         var loc = GetLocationTool.ResolveLocation(world, idOrName);
2270 |         if (loc is null)
2271 |             return ToolResult.Error(string.Empty, "Локация не найдена.");
2272 | 
2273 |         var sb = new System.Text.StringBuilder();
2274 |         sb.AppendLine($"Поиск в «{loc.Name}»:");
2275 | 
2276 |         // Ground items.
2277 |         if (loc.Items.Count > 0)
2278 |         {
2279 |             sb.AppendLine("Предметы на земле:");
2280 |             foreach (var itemId in loc.Items)
2281 |             {
2282 |                 var item = world.GetItem(itemId);
2283 |                 if (item is not null)
2284 |                     sb.AppendLine($"  • {item.Name} ×{item.Quantity} (id: {item.Id})");
2285 |             }
2286 |         }
2287 |         else
2288 |             sb.AppendLine("На земле ничего нет.");
2289 | 
2290 |         // Dead NPCs (lootable corpses).
2291 |         var corpses = loc.Npcs
2292 |             .Select(id => world.GetNpc(id))
2293 |             .Where(n => n is not null && !n!.IsAlive)
2294 |             .ToList();
2295 |         if (corpses.Count > 0)
2296 |         {
2297 |             sb.AppendLine("Трупы (можно обыскать):");
2298 |             foreach (var corpse in corpses)
2299 |             {
2300 |                 var invCount = corpse!.Inventory.Items.Count;
2301 |                 var currency = corpse.Inventory.Currency;
2302 |                 sb.AppendLine($"  • {corpse.Name} — {invCount} предм., {currency} зол.");
2303 |             }
2304 |         }
2305 | 
2306 |         // Containers (items flagged as containers — use Flags["container"]).
2307 |         var containers = loc.Items
2308 |             .Select(id => world.GetItem(id))
2309 |             .Where(i => i is not null && i.Flags?.TryGetValue("container", out var v) == true && v is true)
2310 |             .ToList();
2311 |         if (containers.Count > 0)
2312 |         {
2313 |             sb.AppendLine("Контейнеры:");
2314 |             foreach (var c in containers)
2315 |                 sb.AppendLine($"  • {c!.Name} (id: {c.Id})");
2316 |         }
2317 | 
2318 |         return ToolResult.Ok(string.Empty, sb.ToString().TrimEnd());
2319 |     };
2320 | }

2460 |     {
2461 |         var idOrName = args.TryGetProperty("locationId", out var lEl) ? lEl.GetString() ?? "" : "";
2462 |         var entrance = GetLocationTool.ResolveLocation(world, idOrName);
2463 |         if (entrance is null)
2464 |             return ToolResult.Error(string.Empty, "Локация не найдена.");
2465 | 
2466 |         // Don't re-generate if the dungeon already has sub-locations.
2467 |         if (entrance.Flags?.TryGetValue("dungeonGenerated", out var v) == true && v is true)
2468 |             return ToolResult.Ok(string.Empty, $"Подземелье «{entrance.Name}» уже сгенерировано.");
2469 | 
2470 |         var roomCount = args.TryGetProperty("roomCount", out var rEl) && rEl.TryGetInt32(out var rc)
2471 |             ? Math.Clamp(rc, 5, 15)
2472 |             : world.Rng.NextInt(5, 16);
2473 | 
2474 |         var theme = args.TryGetProperty("theme", out var tEl) ? tEl.GetString() ?? "catacombs" : "catacombs";
2475 | 
2476 |         // Generate rooms as a linear graph with some branches.
2477 |         var rooms = new List<MyGame.Core.World.Entities.Location>();
2478 |         var prevRoom = entrance;
2479 | 
2480 |         for (int i = 0; i < roomCount; i++)
2481 |         {
2482 |             var roomName = $"{entrance.Name}: Комната {i + 1}";
2483 |             var desc = RoomDescriptions[world.Rng.NextInt(RoomDescriptions.Length)];
2484 |             var room = new MyGame.Core.World.Entities.Location
2485 |             {
2486 |                 Id = EntityId.NewId(),
2487 |                 Name = roomName,
2488 |                 Description = desc,
2489 |                 Terrain = "underground",
2490 |                 Danger = Math.Min(10, entrance.Danger + world.Rng.NextInt(0, 3)),
2491 |                 Visited = i == 0, // first room is immediately visible
2492 |                 Discovered = i == 0,
2493 |             };
2494 |             room.Flags ??= new();
2495 |             room.Flags["dungeonRoom"] = true;
2496 |             room.Flags["dungeonTheme"] = theme;
2497 | 
2498 |             // Connect to previous room (bidirectional).
2499 |             var dirTo = i == 0 ? "вглубь" : $"дальше";
2500 |             var dirBack = i == 0 ? $"наружу (к «{entrance.Name}»)" : "назад";
2501 |             var targetId = i == 0 ? entrance.Id : rooms[i - 1].Id;
2502 | 
2503 |             room.Exits.Add(new MyGame.Core.World.Entities.LocationExit
2504 |             {
2505 |                 To = targetId,
2506 |                 Direction = dirBack,
2507 |             });
2508 | 
2509 |             if (i == 0)
2510 |             {
2511 |                 // Connect entrance → first room.
2512 |                 entrance.Exits.Add(new MyGame.Core.World.Entities.LocationExit
2513 |                 {
2514 |                     To = room.Id,
2515 |                     Direction = dirTo,
2516 |                 });
2517 |             }
2518 |             else
2519 |             {
2520 |                 // Connect previous room → this room.
2521 |                 rooms[i - 1].Exits.Add(new MyGame.Core.World.Entities.LocationExit
2522 |                 {
2523 |                     To = room.Id,
2524 |                     Direction = dirTo,
2525 |                 });
2526 |             }
2527 | 
2528 |             // 40% chance to spawn an NPC in this room.
2529 |             if (world.Rng.NextInt(100) < 40)
2530 |             {
2531 |                 var tplId = DungeonNpcTemplates[world.Rng.NextInt(DungeonNpcTemplates.Length)];
2532 |                 var npc = world.SpawnNpcFromTemplate(tplId, room.Id);
2533 |                 if (npc is not null && !string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(npc.Disposition))
2534 |                     npc.Disposition = "hostile";
2535 |             }
2536 | 
2537 |             // 30% chance to place loot on the ground.
2538 |             if (world.Rng.NextInt(100) < 30)
2539 |             {
2540 |                 var itemTpl = world.Registries.Items.All()
2541 |                     .Where(t => t.Rarity is "common" or "uncommon")
2542 |                     .OrderBy(_ => world.Rng.NextInt(1000))
2543 |                     .FirstOrDefault();
2544 |                 if (itemTpl is not null)
2545 |                 {
2546 |                     var item = MyGame.Core.World.EntityFactory.InstantiateItem(itemTpl, world.Rng.NextInt(1, 3));
2547 |                     world.SpawnItemOnGround(item, room.Id);
2548 |                 }
2549 |             }
2550 | 
2551 |             rooms.Add(room);
2552 |             world.AddLocation(room);
2553 |         }
2554 | 
2555 |         // Mark entrance as generated.
2556 |         entrance.Flags ??= new();
2557 |         entrance.Flags["dungeonGenerated"] = true;
2558 | 
2559 |         return ToolResult.Ok(string.Empty,
2560 |             $"Сгенерировано подземелье «{entrance.Name}»: {roomCount} комнат, тема: {theme}. " +
2561 |             $"{rooms.Count(r => r.Npcs.Count > 0)} комнат с обитателями, " +
2562 |             $"{rooms.Count(r => r.Items.Count > 0)} комнат с добычей.");
2563 |     };
2564 | }

   5 | /// <summary>
   6 | /// Structured world plan produced by the world-planner agent and consumed
   7 | /// by the location/population/buildings/content/narrator sub-agents. Port
   8 | /// of <c>ai/worldPlan.ts</c>.
   9 | ///
  10 | /// Fields are intentionally simple (strings/numbers/arrays) so the LLM can
  11 | /// produce a valid JSON tool-call. Template IDs reference the standard
  12 | /// content registry (<c>World.Content.data.json</c>) or custom templates
  13 | /// the planner itself creates in <see cref="WorldPlan.CustomItemTemplates"/>
  14 | /// / <see cref="WorldPlan.CustomNpcTemplates"/> /
  15 | /// <see cref="WorldPlan.CustomBuildingTemplates"/>.
  16 | /// </summary>
  17 | public sealed record WorldPlan
  18 | {
  19 |     /// <summary>World title (e.g. «Тёмные Шпили Велариса»).</summary>
  20 |     public required string Title { get; init; }
  21 | 
  22 |     /// <summary>Genre / theme tag: <c>dark fantasy</c>, <c>cyberpunk</c>, etc.</summary>
  23 |     public required string Theme { get; init; }
  24 | 
  25 |     /// <summary>1–2 sentence setting description.</summary>
  26 |     public required string Setting { get; init; }
  27 | 
  28 |     /// <summary>Atmospheric tone — feeds the narrator's voice.</summary>
  29 |     public required string Atmosphere { get; init; }
  30 | 
  31 |     /// <summary>
  32 |     /// Generation mode chosen by the player at world creation.
  33 |     /// <c>full</c> = planner plans ALL regions; initial build creates the
  34 |     /// whole world. <c>chunked</c> = planner plans ONLY the start region;
  35 |     /// others are generated on-demand via travel. Defaults to <c>full</c>
  36 |     /// for back-compat with plans that predate the mode field.

 403 | /// <summary>
 404 | /// Request to start a world-build. Port-side record — the TS source passed
 405 | /// a bare <c>brief</c> string; we wrap it (plus optional caller hints) so
 406 | /// the orchestrator can carry extra fields like the desired generation
 407 | /// mode, an optional seed, and a target ruleset name without changing the
 408 | /// orchestrator's signature.
 409 | /// </summary>
 410 | public sealed record WorldPlanRequest
 411 | {
 412 |     /// <summary>Free-form player brief (the world they want).</summary>
 413 |     public required string Brief { get; init; }
 414 | 
 415 |     /// <summary>Optional generation mode override; null = planner chooses.</summary>
 416 |     public string? GenerationMode { get; init; }
 417 | 
 418 |     /// <summary>Optional RNG seed for deterministic build (debugging / replays).</summary>
 419 |     public long? Seed { get; init; }
 420 | 
 421 |     /// <summary>Optional ruleset name hint (e.g. <c>cyberpunk-lite</c>).</summary>
 422 |     public string? RulesetHint { get; init; }
 423 | }
 424 | 
 425 | /// <summary>
 426 | /// Progress report emitted by the world-builder orchestrator. The UI binds
 427 | /// a progress bar / step list to this.
 428 | /// </summary>
 429 | public sealed record WorldBuildProgress
 430 | {
 431 |     /// <summary>Stage id (planning / ruleset / locations / population / buildings / content / narration / done / error).</summary>
 432 |     public required string Stage { get; init; }
 433 | 
 434 |     /// <summary>Status of this stage.</summary>
 435 |     public ProgressStatus Status { get; init; } = ProgressStatus.Active;
 436 | 
 437 |     /// <summary>Human-readable label (RU).</summary>
 438 |     public required string Label { get; init; }
 439 | 
 440 |     /// <summary>Optional detail / sub-step text.</summary>
 441 |     public string? Detail { get; init; }
 442 | 
 443 |     /// <summary>0–100 percent complete for the whole build.</summary>
 444 |     public int Percent { get; init; }
 445 | }
 446 | 
 447 | /// <summary>Status of one build stage.</summary>
 448 | public enum ProgressStatus
 449 | {
 450 |     Active,
 451 |     Done,
 452 |     Error,
 453 |     Skipped,
 454 | }

--- src/MyGame.Core/Common/EntityId.cs (C#, 137 lines, ~1,467 tokens) ---
   1 | using System.Text.Json;
   2 | using System.Text.Json.Serialization;
   3 | 
   4 | namespace MyGame.Core.Common;
   5 | 
   6 | /// <summary>
   7 | /// Strong-typed identifier for game entities.
   8 | ///
   9 | /// Port of <c>engine/core/entityId.ts</c>. The TS version built IDs by
  10 | /// prefixing a UUID with the entity type (<c>plr_&lt;uuid&gt;</c>,
  11 | /// <c>npc_&lt;uuid&gt;</c>, ...). For the C# rewrite we use a single
  12 | /// cuid-style value (timestamp base36 + random) so that IDs are:
  13 | ///  - globally unique without coordination,
  14 | ///  - lexicographically sortable by creation time (handy for log scanning),
  15 | ///  - cheap to compare and store.
  16 | ///
  17 | /// The type is a <see cref="readonly record struct"/> wrapping a string, so
  18 | /// value-equality, hashing, and <c>==</c>/<c>!=</c> come for free. We add
  19 | /// ordinal <see cref="IComparable{T}"/> for sortability, implicit string
  20 | /// conversions for ergonomic call sites, and a custom
  21 | /// <see cref="JsonConverter{T}"/> so IDs serialise as bare strings on the wire
  22 | /// and in save files (no <c>{ "value": "..." }</c> wrapper).
  23 | /// </summary>
  24 | [JsonConverter(typeof(EntityIdJsonConverter))]
  25 | public readonly record struct EntityId(string Value) : IComparable<EntityId>
  26 | {
  27 |     /// <summary>An empty ID, used as a sentinel "unassigned" value.</summary>
  28 |     public static readonly EntityId Empty = new(string.Empty);
  29 | 
  30 |     private const string Alphabet = "0123456789abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz";
  31 |     private const int TimestampWidth = 9;   // base36 digits for ms timestamp
  32 |     private const int RandomWidth = 12;     // base36 digits of entropy
  33 | 
  34 |     /// <summary>
  35 |     /// Mint a new unique ID. Format: <c>c</c> + 9-char base36 timestamp
  36 |     /// (ms since epoch, zero-padded) + 12-char base36 random suffix.
  37 |     /// The fixed-width timestamp prefix makes IDs generated in time order
  38 |     /// sort lexicographically.
  39 |     /// </summary>
  40 |     public static EntityId NewId()
  41 |     {
  42 |         var timestamp = (ulong)DateTimeOffset.UtcNow.ToUnixTimeMilliseconds();
  43 |         var tsPart = ToBase36Padded(timestamp, TimestampWidth);
  44 |         var randPart = RandomBase36(RandomWidth);
  45 |         return new EntityId($"c{tsPart}{randPart}");
  46 |     }
  47 | 
  48 |     /// <summary>Parse a string into an <see cref="EntityId"/>.</summary>
  49 |     /// <exception cref="ArgumentException">input is null or empty.</exception>
  50 |     public static EntityId Parse(string input)
  51 |     {
  52 |         if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(input))
  53 |             throw new ArgumentException("EntityId value cannot be null or empty.", nameof(input));
  54 |         return new EntityId(input);
  55 |     }
  56 | 
  57 |     /// <summary>Try-parse variant — never throws.</summary>
  58 |     public static bool TryParse(string? input, out EntityId result)
  59 |     {
  60 |         if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(input))
  61 |         {
  62 |             result = default;
  63 |             return false;
  64 |         }
  65 |         result = new EntityId(input);
  66 |         return true;
  67 |     }
  68 | 
  69 |     /// <summary>
  70 |     /// Ordinal comparison so that IDs sort by their raw bytes — which, given
  71 |     /// the fixed-width timestamp prefix, is also creation-time order.
  72 |     /// </summary>
  73 |     public int CompareTo(EntityId other) =>
  74 |         string.CompareOrdinal(Value, other.Value);
  75 | 
  76 |     /// <summary>Return the raw string value.</summary>
  77 |     public override string ToString() => Value;
  78 | 
  79 |     /// <summary>Allow <c>string s = entityId;</c> for ergonomic API calls.</summary>
  80 |     public static implicit operator string(EntityId id) => id.Value;
  81 | 
  82 |     /// <summary>Allow <c>EntityId id = "abc";</c> for ergonomic literals.</summary>
  83 |     public static implicit operator EntityId(string s) => new(s);
  84 | 
  85 |     // ── base36 helpers ────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  86 | 
  87 |     private static string ToBase36(ulong value)
  88 |     {
  89 |         if (value == 0) return "0";
  90 |         Span<char> buffer = stackalloc char[16];
  91 |         int pos = 16;
  92 |         while (value > 0)
  93 |         {
  94 |             buffer[--pos] = Alphabet[(int)(value % 36)];
  95 |             value /= 36;
  96 |         }
  97 |         return new string(buffer.Slice(pos));
  98 |     }
  99 | 
 100 |     private static string ToBase36Padded(ulong value, int width)
 101 |     {
 102 |         var s = ToBase36(value);
 103 |         return s.Length >= width ? s : s.PadLeft(width, '0');
 104 |     }
 105 | 
 106 |     private static string RandomBase36(int length)
 107 |     {
 108 |         Span<char> buffer = stackalloc char[length];
 109 |         for (int i = 0; i < length; i++)
 110 |             buffer[i] = Alphabet[Random.Shared.Next(36)];
 111 |         return new string(buffer);
 112 |     }
 113 | }
 114 | 
 115 | /// <summary>
 116 | /// Serialises <see cref="EntityId"/> as a bare JSON string — never as an
 117 | /// object. Applied automatically via the <c>[JsonConverter]</c> attribute on
 118 | /// the type, so callers don't need to register anything with
 119 | /// <see cref="JsonSerializerOptions"/>.
 120 | /// </summary>
 121 | public sealed class EntityIdJsonConverter : JsonConverter<EntityId>
 122 | {
 123 |     /// <inheritdoc />
 124 |     public override EntityId Read(
 125 |         ref Utf8JsonReader reader,
 126 |         Type typeToConvert,
 127 |         JsonSerializerOptions options) =>
 128 |         new EntityId(reader.GetString() ?? string.Empty);
 129 | 
 130 |     /// <inheritdoc />
 131 |     public override void Write(
 132 |         Utf8JsonWriter writer,
 133 |         EntityId value,
 134 |         JsonSerializerOptions options) =>
 135 |         writer.WriteStringValue(value.Value);
 136 | }

--- src/MyGame.Core/Common/EventBus.cs (C#, 110 lines, ~1,049 tokens) ---
   1 | using System.Collections.Concurrent;
   2 | using System.Diagnostics;
   3 | 
   4 | namespace MyGame.Core.Common;
   5 | 
   6 | /// <summary>
   7 | /// Tiny typed in-process pub/sub bus.
   8 | ///
   9 | /// Port of <c>engine/core/eventBus.ts</c>. The TS version kept a single set
  10 | /// of <c>EngineEventListener</c>s and dispatched every event through them;
  11 | /// the C# rewrite is generic — <see cref="Subscribe{T}"/> registers a handler
  12 | /// for a specific event type and <see cref="Publish{T}"/> only invokes
  13 | /// handlers registered for that exact type. This gives compile-time typing
  14 | /// and avoids the runtime type-switching the TS engine had to do.
  15 | ///
  16 | /// Thread safety: uses a <see cref="ConcurrentDictionary{TKey,TValue}"/> to
  17 | /// map event type → handler list, and takes a brief lock on the per-type list
  18 | /// during subscribe/unsubscribe and during the snapshot phase of publish.
  19 | /// Handlers themselves run outside the lock so a handler that subscribes more
  20 | /// handlers cannot deadlock the bus.
  21 | ///
  22 | /// Listeners must never break the engine: any exception thrown by a handler
  23 | /// is swallowed and logged via <see cref="Trace"/>, mirroring the TS
  24 | /// <c>try/catch</c> around each listener invocation.
  25 | /// </summary>
  26 | public sealed class EventBus
  27 | {
  28 |     private readonly ConcurrentDictionary<Type, object> _handlersByType = new();
  29 | 
  30 |     /// <summary>
  31 |     /// Register a handler for events of type <typeparamref name="T"/>.
  32 |     /// Returns an <see cref="IDisposable"/> token; disposing it unsubscribes
  33 |     /// the handler. Safe to dispose multiple times.
  34 |     /// </summary>
  35 |     public IDisposable Subscribe<T>(Action<T> handler)
  36 |     {
  37 |         if (handler is null) throw new ArgumentNullException(nameof(handler));
  38 | 
  39 |         var list = (List<Action<T>>)_handlersByType.GetOrAdd(
  40 |             typeof(T),
  41 |             _ => new List<Action<T>>());
  42 | 
  43 |         lock (list)
  44 |         {
  45 |             list.Add(handler);
  46 |         }
  47 | 
  48 |         return new SubscriptionToken<T>(list, handler);
  49 |     }
  50 | 
  51 |     /// <summary>
  52 |     /// Publish an event to all registered handlers of type
  53 |     /// <typeparamref name="T"/>. Exceptions in handlers are caught and
  54 |     /// traced; they do not stop dispatch to subsequent handlers.
  55 |     /// </summary>
  56 |     public void Publish<T>(T evt)
  57 |     {
  58 |         if (!_handlersByType.TryGetValue(typeof(T), out var raw)) return;
  59 |         var list = (List<Action<T>>)raw;
  60 | 
  61 |         Action<T>[] snapshot;
  62 |         lock (list)
  63 |         {
  64 |             snapshot = list.Count == 0 ? Array.Empty<Action<T>>() : list.ToArray();
  65 |         }
  66 | 
  67 |         foreach (var h in snapshot)
  68 |         {
  69 |             try
  70 |             {
  71 |                 h(evt);
  72 |             }
  73 |             catch (Exception ex)
  74 |             {
  75 |                 Trace.WriteLine($"[EventBus] listener threw: {ex}");
  76 |             }
  77 |         }
  78 |     }
  79 | 
  80 |     /// <summary>Remove all handlers for all event types.</summary>
  81 |     public void Clear() => _handlersByType.Clear();
  82 | 
  83 |     /// <summary>
  84 |     /// Unsubscribe token returned by <see cref="Subscribe{T}"/>. Holds a
  85 |     /// reference to its handler list so it doesn't need a back-pointer to the
  86 |     /// bus. Disposing twice is a no-op.
  87 |     /// </summary>
  88 |     private sealed class SubscriptionToken<T> : IDisposable
  89 |     {
  90 |         private readonly List<Action<T>> _list;
  91 |         private Action<T>? _handler; // nulled out on Dispose for idempotency
  92 | 
  93 |         public SubscriptionToken(List<Action<T>> list, Action<T> handler)
  94 |         {
  95 |             _list = list;
  96 |             _handler = handler;
  97 |         }
  98 | 
  99 |         public void Dispose()
 100 |         {
 101 |             var h = Interlocked.Exchange(ref _handler, null);
 102 |             if (h is null) return;
 103 |             lock (_list)
 104 |             {
 105 |                 _list.Remove(h);
 106 |             }
 107 |         }
 108 |     }
 109 | }

--- src/MyGame.Core/Common/Result.cs (C#, 62 lines, ~596 tokens) ---
   1 | namespace MyGame.Core.Common;
   2 | 
   3 | /// <summary>
   4 | /// Discriminated success/failure type — used in place of thrown exceptions
   5 | /// for expected, recoverable failures (rule resolution, save load, network
   6 | /// calls). A <see cref="Result{T}"/> is either:
   7 | ///   - a success: <see cref="Value"/> is set, <see cref="Error"/> is null,
   8 | ///     <see cref="IsSuccess"/> is true; or
   9 | ///   - a failure: <see cref="Error"/> is non-null, <see cref="Value"/> is
  10 | ///     default, <see cref="IsSuccess"/> is false.
  11 | ///
  12 | /// Use <see cref="Result.Ok{T}"/> and <see cref="Result.Fail{T}"/> to
  13 | /// construct instances.
  14 | /// </summary>
  15 | public readonly record struct Result<T>
  16 | {
  17 |     /// <summary>The value on success; default on failure.</summary>
  18 |     public T? Value { get; init; }
  19 | 
  20 |     /// <summary>Error message on failure; null on success.</summary>
  21 |     public string? Error { get; init; }
  22 | 
  23 |     /// <summary>True if this is a success result.</summary>
  24 |     public bool IsSuccess => Error is null;
  25 | 
  26 |     /// <summary>True if this is a failure result.</summary>
  27 |     public bool IsFailure => Error is not null;
  28 | 
  29 |     /// <summary>
  30 |     /// Construct explicitly. Prefer the <see cref="Result.Ok{T}"/> /
  31 |     /// <see cref="Result.Fail{T}"/> factories for readability.
  32 |     /// </summary>
  33 |     public Result(T? value, string? error)
  34 |     {
  35 |         Value = value;
  36 |         Error = error;
  37 |     }
  38 | 
  39 |     /// <summary>Deconstruct for pattern matching.</summary>
  40 |     public void Deconstruct(out T? value, out string? error)
  41 |     {
  42 |         value = Value;
  43 |         error = Error;
  44 |     }
  45 | }
  46 | 
  47 | /// <summary>
  48 | /// Factory methods for <see cref="Result{T}"/>.
  49 | /// </summary>
  50 | public static class Result
  51 | {
  52 |     /// <summary>Build a success result carrying <paramref name="value"/>.</summary>
  53 |     public static Result<T> Ok<T>(T value) => new(value, null);
  54 | 
  55 |     /// <summary>
  56 |     /// Build a failure result carrying <paramref name="error"/>.
  57 |     /// <typeparamref name="T"/> must be specified explicitly because there is
  58 |     /// no value to infer it from.
  59 |     /// </summary>
  60 |     public static Result<T> Fail<T>(string error) => new(default, error);
  61 | }

--- src/MyGame.Core/Common/Rng.cs (C#, 166 lines, ~1,742 tokens) ---
   1 | namespace MyGame.Core.Common;
   2 | 
   3 | /// <summary>
   4 | /// Deterministic, seedable pseudo-random number generator.
   5 | ///
   6 | /// Port of <c>engine/core/rng.ts</c>. The TS original used mulberry32 with a
   7 | /// 32-bit state; this C# port upgrades to <c>PCG32</c> (Permuted Congruential
   8 | /// Generator) with a 64-bit state — better statistical quality, longer
   9 | /// period, and a state that fits in a single <see langword="long"/> for
  10 | /// trivial save/load round-tripping.
  11 | ///
  12 | /// Why seeded? Same reason as the TS port:
  13 | ///  - dice rolls are reproducible from a save (anti-cheat / debugging / replay)
  14 | ///  - the world simulation can be deterministic given a seed.
  15 | ///
  16 | /// The engine holds one <see cref="Rng"/> per save; the seed/state is
  17 | /// persisted in save meta via <see cref="State"/> + <see cref="FromState"/>.
  18 | ///
  19 | /// Thread safety: NOT thread-safe by design. The engine is single-threaded;
  20 | /// if a subsystem (e.g. an AI sub-agent) needs its own stream it should call
  21 | /// <see cref="Fork"/> to obtain an independent <see cref="Rng"/>.
  22 | /// </summary>
  23 | public sealed class Rng
  24 | {
  25 |     // PCG32 constants (see O'Neill 2014, pcg-random.org).
  26 |     // state = state * Multiplier + Increment  (mod 2^64)
  27 |     private const ulong Multiplier = 6364136223846793005UL;
  28 |     // Must be odd; this is the standard default stream/increment.
  29 |     private const ulong Increment = 1442695040888963407UL;
  30 | 
  31 |     private ulong _state;
  32 | 
  33 |     /// <summary>
  34 |     /// Create a fresh generator seeded from <paramref name="seed"/>. Two
  35 |     /// instances created with the same seed produce identical sequences.
  36 |     /// </summary>
  37 |     public Rng(long seed)
  38 |     {
  39 |         // Standard PCG seeding: start at zero, advance, mix in seed, advance.
  40 |         _state = 0UL;
  41 |         Step();
  42 |         _state = unchecked(_state + (ulong)seed);
  43 |         Step();
  44 |     }
  45 | 
  46 |     // Private ctor for FromState — bypasses the seeding dance.
  47 |     private Rng(ulong state)
  48 |     {
  49 |         _state = state;
  50 |     }
  51 | 
  52 |     /// <summary>
  53 |     /// Snapshot of the internal state. Persist this in save meta to allow
  54 |     /// exact round-trip via <see cref="FromState"/>.
  55 |     /// </summary>
  56 |     public long State
  57 |     {
  58 |         get => (long)_state;
  59 |         set => _state = (ulong)value;
  60 |     }
  61 | 
  62 |     /// <summary>
  63 |     /// Reconstruct a <see cref="Rng"/> from a previously snapshotted state.
  64 |     /// The restored generator continues exactly where the original left off.
  65 |     /// </summary>
  66 |     public static Rng FromState(long state) => new Rng((ulong)state);
  67 | 
  68 |     /// <summary>
  69 |     /// Advance the LCG state by one step (no output produced). Used during
  70 |     /// seeding to mix in the seed value.
  71 |     /// </summary>
  72 |     private void Step()
  73 |     {
  74 |         _state = unchecked(_state * Multiplier + Increment);
  75 |     }
  76 | 
  77 |     /// <summary>
  78 |     /// Advance the PCG state by one step and produce a 32-bit output.
  79 |     /// Private — callers use <see cref="Next"/> / <see cref="NextInt(int)"/>.
  80 |     /// </summary>
  81 |     private uint NextUint()
  82 |     {
  83 |         ulong oldstate = _state;
  84 |         _state = unchecked(oldstate * Multiplier + Increment);
  85 |         // PCG-XSH-RR output function.
  86 |         ulong xorshifted = ((oldstate >> 18) ^ oldstate) >> 27;
  87 |         int rot = (int)(oldstate >> 59);
  88 |         return (uint)((xorshifted >> rot) | (xorshifted << ((-rot) & 31)));
  89 |     }
  90 | 
  91 |     /// <summary>
  92 |     /// Uniform double in [0, 1). Uses the top 32 bits of state output divided
  93 |     /// by 2^32, so the result is strictly less than 1.
  94 |     /// </summary>
  95 |     public double Next() => NextUint() / 4294967296.0;
  96 | 
  97 |     /// <summary>
  98 |     /// Uniform integer in [0, max). Matches <see cref="Random.Next(int)"/>
  99 |     /// convention — exclusive upper bound.
 100 |     /// </summary>
 101 |     /// <exception cref="ArgumentOutOfRangeException">max &lt;= 0.</exception>
 102 |     public int NextInt(int max)
 103 |     {
 104 |         if (max <= 0)
 105 |             throw new ArgumentOutOfRangeException(nameof(max), "max must be positive.");
 106 |         return (int)(NextUint() % (uint)max);
 107 |     }
 108 | 
 109 |     /// <summary>
 110 |     /// Uniform integer in [min, max). Matches
 111 |     /// <see cref="Random.Next(int,int)"/> convention — exclusive upper bound.
 112 |     /// </summary>
 113 |     /// <exception cref="ArgumentOutOfRangeException">min &gt;= max.</exception>
 114 |     public int NextInt(int min, int max)
 115 |     {
 116 |         if (min >= max)
 117 |             throw new ArgumentOutOfRangeException(nameof(max), "max must be greater than min.");
 118 |         uint range = (uint)(max - min);
 119 |         return min + (int)(NextUint() % range);
 120 |     }
 121 | 
 122 |     /// <summary>
 123 |     /// Pick a uniformly random element from a non-empty list. Does not mutate
 124 |     /// the list.
 125 |     /// </summary>
 126 |     /// <exception cref="ArgumentException">items is empty.</exception>
 127 |     public T Pick<T>(IReadOnlyList<T> items)
 128 |     {
 129 |         if (items is null) throw new ArgumentNullException(nameof(items));
 130 |         if (items.Count == 0)
 131 |             throw new ArgumentException("items must be non-empty.", nameof(items));
 132 |         return items[NextInt(items.Count)];
 133 |     }
 134 | 
 135 |     /// <summary>
 136 |     /// In-place Fisher-Yates shuffle. The list is mutated; no copy is made.
 137 |     /// Port of <c>rng.shuffle</c> from the TS (note: TS returned a new array,
 138 |     /// here we mutate to match <see cref="List{T}"/> / array idioms).
 139 |     /// </summary>
 140 |     public void Shuffle<T>(IList<T> list)
 141 |     {
 142 |         if (list is null) throw new ArgumentNullException(nameof(list));
 143 |         for (int i = list.Count - 1; i > 0; i--)
 144 |         {
 145 |             int j = NextInt(i + 1);
 146 |             (list[i], list[j]) = (list[j], list[i]);
 147 |         }
 148 |     }
 149 | 
 150 |     /// <summary>
 151 |     /// Spawn an independent <see cref="Rng"/> whose stream is derived from
 152 |     /// the current state. Consumes 64 bits of state from the parent. Useful
 153 |     /// for handing an AI sub-agent its own deterministic stream without
 154 |     /// sharing mutable state.
 155 |     /// </summary>
 156 |     public Rng Fork()
 157 |     {
 158 |         ulong lo = NextUint();
 159 |         ulong hi = NextUint();
 160 |         ulong combined = lo | (hi << 32);
 161 |         // Rng(long) does the full PCG seeding dance; the cast to long is
 162 |         // lossless because we feed it back through unchecked arithmetic.
 163 |         return new Rng((long)combined);
 164 |     }
 165 | }

--- src/MyGame.Core/Common/Version.cs (C#, 69 lines, ~731 tokens) ---
   1 | namespace MyGame.Core.Common;
   2 | 
   3 | /// <summary>
   4 | /// Engine version constants and helpers.
   5 | ///
   6 | /// Port of <c>engine/core/version.ts</c>. The TS file was a one-liner
   7 | /// (<c>export const ENGINE_VERSION = '0.2.0'</c>); the C# port adds a small
   8 | /// semver parse/compare helper so <see cref="SaveManager"/> (later task) can
   9 | /// decide whether a save file is loadable by the current engine.
  10 | ///
  11 | /// Bump <see cref="Current"/> whenever the save file layout changes in a
  12 | /// breaking way. The save meta should persist this string verbatim.
  13 | /// </summary>
  14 | public static class Version
  15 | {
  16 |     /// <summary>Current engine version, persisted in save meta.</summary>
  17 |     public const string Current = "0.2.0";
  18 | 
  19 |     /// <summary>
  20 |     /// Try to parse a dotted numeric version string
  21 |     /// (<c>major.minor.patch</c>). Missing components default to 0. Returns
  22 |     /// false for null/empty/garbage input without throwing.
  23 |     /// </summary>
  24 |     public static bool TryParse(string? input, out (int Major, int Minor, int Patch) version)
  25 |     {
  26 |         version = default;
  27 |         if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(input)) return false;
  28 | 
  29 |         var parts = input.Split('.');
  30 |         if (parts.Length is < 1 or > 3) return false;
  31 |         if (!int.TryParse(parts[0], out var major)) return false;
  32 | 
  33 |         int minor = 0, patch = 0;
  34 |         if (parts.Length > 1 && !int.TryParse(parts[1], out minor)) return false;
  35 |         if (parts.Length > 2 && !int.TryParse(parts[2], out patch)) return false;
  36 | 
  37 |         version = (major, minor, patch);
  38 |         return true;
  39 |     }
  40 | 
  41 |     /// <summary>
  42 |     /// Compare two version strings numerically (component-wise). Unparseable
  43 |     /// components are treated as 0, so <c>Compare("1.0", "1.0.0") == 0</c>.
  44 |     /// </summary>
  45 |     public static int Compare(string a, string b)
  46 |     {
  47 |         TryParse(a, out var va);
  48 |         TryParse(b, out var vb);
  49 |         int c = va.Major.CompareTo(vb.Major);
  50 |         if (c != 0) return c;
  51 |         c = va.Minor.CompareTo(vb.Minor);
  52 |         if (c != 0) return c;
  53 |         return va.Patch.CompareTo(vb.Patch);
  54 |     }
  55 | 
  56 |     /// <summary>
  57 |     /// Compatibility check for save files: same major version = compatible.
  58 |     /// Minor/patch differences are allowed (forward/backward compatible
  59 |     /// additions). Caller is responsible for any required migration when the
  60 |     /// minors differ.
  61 |     /// </summary>
  62 |     public static bool IsCompatible(string savedVersion)
  63 |     {
  64 |         if (!TryParse(savedVersion, out var saved)) return false;
  65 |         TryParse(Current, out var current);
  66 |         return saved.Major == current.Major;
  67 |     }
  68 | }

   2 | using System.Linq;
   3 | using System.Text.Json;
   4 | using MyGame.Core.World;
   5 | using MyGame.Core.World.Entities;
   6 | 
   7 | // 'World' is both a namespace and a type — alias to avoid the collision.
   8 | using GameWorld = MyGame.Core.World.World;
   9 | 
  10 | namespace MyGame.Core.Engine;

  12 | /// <summary>

  16 | public static class AchievementTracker
  17 | {
  18 |     private static readonly List<Achievement> _definitions = new()
  19 |     {
  20 |         new("first_combat", "Первый бой", "Участвуйте в первом бою",
  21 |             w => w.Combat is { Active: true } || w.Npcs.Any(n => !n.IsAlive)),
  22 |         new("first_quest", "Первый квест", "Завершите первый квест",

  24 |         new("explorer_10", "Исследователь", "Посетите 10 локаций",

  26 |         new("explorer_25", "Картограф", "Посетите 25 локаций",
  27 |             w => w.Locations.Count(l => l.Visited) >= 25),
  28 |         new("level_5", "Опытный", "Достигните 5-го уровня",

  33 |             w => (w.ActivePlayer?.Inventory.Currency ?? 0) >= 500),
  34 |         new("slayer", "Убийца", "Победите 10 врагов",
  35 |             w => w.Npcs.Count(n => !n.IsAlive) >= 10),
  36 |     };
  37 | 
  38 |     public static List<Achievement> CheckMilestones(GameWorld world)
  39 |     {
  40 |         var unlocked = GetUnlocked(world);
  41 |         var newlyUnlocked = new List<Achievement>();
  42 |         foreach (var ach in _definitions)
  43 |         {
  44 |             if (unlocked.Contains(ach.Id)) continue;
  45 |             if (ach.Check(world))
  46 |             {
  47 |                 newlyUnlocked.Add(ach);
  48 |                 unlocked.Add(ach.Id);
  49 |             }
  50 |         }
  51 |         if (newlyUnlocked.Count > 0) SetUnlocked(world, unlocked);
  52 |         return newlyUnlocked;
  53 |     }
  54 | 
  55 |     public static List<string> GetUnlocked(GameWorld world)
  56 |     {
  57 |         if (world.Flags is null) return new();
  58 |         if (!world.Flags.TryGetValue("achievements", out var val)) return new();
  59 |         try { return JsonSerializer.Deserialize<List<string>>(val.ToString() ?? "") ?? new(); }
  60 |         catch { return new(); }
  61 |     }
  62 | 
  63 |     public static void SetUnlocked(GameWorld world, List<string> ids)
  64 |     {
  65 |         world.Flags ??= new();
  66 |         world.Flags["achievements"] = JsonSerializer.Serialize(ids);
  67 |     }
  68 | 
  69 |     public static IReadOnlyList<Achievement> All => _definitions;
  70 | }
  71 | 
  72 | public sealed record Achievement(string Id, string Name, string Description, System.Func<GameWorld, bool> Check);

--- src/MyGame.Core/I18n/Strings.cs (C#, 71 lines, ~626 tokens) ---
   1 | using System.Collections.Generic;
   2 | using System.IO;
   3 | using System.Text.Json;
   4 | 
   5 | namespace MyGame.Core.I18n;
   6 | 
   7 | /// <summary>
   8 | /// Internationalization framework (issue #48). Loads string resources
   9 | /// from JSON files. Falls back to Russian when a translation is missing.
  10 | /// </summary>
  11 | public static class Strings
  12 | {
  13 |     private static Dictionary<string, string> _active = new();
  14 |     private static Dictionary<string, string> _fallback = new();
  15 |     private static string _language = "ru";
  16 | 
  17 |     public static string Language => _language;
  18 | 
  19 |     public static void SetLanguage(string lang)
  20 |     {
  21 |         _language = lang ?? "ru";
  22 |         _active = LoadLanguage(_language);
  23 |         if (_language != "ru")
  24 |             _fallback = LoadLanguage("ru");
  25 |     }
  26 | 
  27 |     public static string Get(string key, params object[] args)
  28 |     {
  29 |         var value = GetValue(_active, key) ?? GetValue(_fallback, key) ?? key;
  30 |         return args.Length > 0 ? string.Format(value, args) : value;
  31 |     }
  32 | 
  33 |     private static string? GetValue(Dictionary<string, string> dict, string key)
  34 |     {
  35 |         foreach (var kv in dict)
  36 |         {
  37 |             if (kv.Key.Equals(key, System.StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase))
  38 |                 return kv.Value;
  39 |         }
  40 |         return null;
  41 |     }
  42 | 
  43 |     private static Dictionary<string, string> LoadLanguage(string lang)
  44 |     {
  45 |         var assembly = typeof(Strings).Assembly;
  46 |         var resourceName = $"MyGame.Core.I18n.locales.{lang}.json";
  47 |         try
  48 |         {
  49 |             using var stream = assembly.GetManifestResourceStream(resourceName);
  50 |             if (stream is not null)
  51 |             {
  52 |                 using var reader = new StreamReader(stream);
  53 |                 return JsonSerializer.Deserialize<Dictionary<string, string>>(reader.ReadToEnd()) ?? new();
  54 |             }
  55 |         }
  56 |         catch { }
  57 | 
  58 |         try
  59 |         {
  60 |             var filePath = Path.Combine(
  61 |                 Profile.ProfileStore.DefaultProfileDirectory,
  62 |                 "locales", $"{lang}.json");
  63 |             if (File.Exists(filePath))
  64 |                 return JsonSerializer.Deserialize<Dictionary<string, string>>(File.ReadAllText(filePath)) ?? new();
  65 |         }
  66 |         catch { }
  67 | 
  68 |         return new();
  69 |     }
  70 | }
