 378 |         else if (IsHost)
 379 |         {
 380 |             InitHost();
 381 |             RefreshFromHostWorld();
 382 |         }
 383 |         else
 384 |         {
 385 |             await InitClientAsync();
 386 |         }
 387 |     }
 388 | 
 389 |     private async Task InitSinglePlayerAsync()
 390 |     {
 391 |         if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(_saveId))
 392 |         {
 393 |             ErrorMessage = "Save id is missing.";
 394 |             return;
 395 |         }
 396 | 
 397 |         var loaded = _saveManager.LoadAll(_saveId);
 398 |         if (loaded is null)
 399 |         {
 400 |             ErrorMessage = $"Сохранение {_saveId} не найдено.";
 401 |             return;
 402 |         }
 403 | 
 404 |         ApplyLoadedSave(loaded.Value.world, loaded.Value.meta, loaded.Value.log, resetHistory: true);
 405 |         await Task.CompletedTask;
 406 |     }
 407 | 
 408 |     /// <summary>
 409 |     /// Apply a freshly-loaded (world, meta, log) tuple to this VM:
 410 |     /// replace <c>_world</c>/<c>_meta</c>, swap the in-memory log,
 411 |     /// build a fresh GameMaster (history reset when
 412 |     /// <paramref name="resetHistory"/> is true), restore session-tokens
 413 |     /// from meta, and refresh the UI. Shared between initial load
 414 |     /// (<see cref="InitSinglePlayerAsync"/>) and the death-overlay
 415 |     /// reload (<see cref="ReloadLastSaveAsync"/>).
 416 |     /// </summary>
 417 |     private void ApplyLoadedSave(World world, SaveMeta meta, LogEntry[] log, bool resetHistory)
 418 |     {
 419 |         _world = world ?? throw new ArgumentNullException(nameof(world));
 420 |         _meta = meta ?? throw new ArgumentNullException(nameof(meta));
 421 | 
 422 |         // Reset the in-memory log to the loaded snapshot. The lock guards
 423 |         // against the AppendLog thread (which can fire from a background
 424 |         // GM continuation) racing the clear.
 425 |         lock (_logLock)
 426 |         {
 427 |             _log.Clear();
 428 |             _log.AddRange(log ?? Array.Empty<LogEntry>());
 429 |         }
 430 |         Dispatcher.UIThread.Post(() =>
 431 |         {
 432 |             Log.Clear();
 433 |             foreach (var e in log ?? Array.Empty<LogEntry>()) Log.Add(e);
 434 |         });
 435 | 
 436 |         var settings = _settingsStore.Load();
 437 |         var ai = new AiClient(settings.Ai);
 438 |         var prompts = ServiceHost.Resolve<PromptLoader>();
 439 |         var tools = new ToolRegistry(_world);
 440 |         _gm = new GameMaster(
 441 |             ai, _world, prompts, tools, settings.MaxToolIterations,
 442 |             aiSettings: settings.Ai,
 443 |             maxContextTokens: settings.MaxContextTokens);
 444 |         if (resetHistory)
 445 |             _gm.ResetHistory();
 446 |         // Restore the conversation-history summary from the save so the
 447 |         // GM doesn't lose context across reload (issue #25). The summary
 448 |         // was persisted on the previous SaveAll; null on a fresh save.
 449 |         _gm.HistorySummary = _meta?.HistorySummary;
 450 | 
 451 |         GameName = _meta?.Name ?? "Игра";
 452 |         CanSave = true;
 453 |         // Issue #85: initialize replay recorder for this save session.
 454 |         var replayDir = System.IO.Path.Combine(
 455 |             MyGame.Core.Profile.ProfileStore.DefaultProfileDirectory, "replays");
 456 |         _replayRecorder = new MyGame.Core.Tooling.ReplayRecorder(replayDir, _saveId ?? "unknown");
 457 |         RestoreTokensFromMeta();
 458 |         // Reset the level-up baseline so a reloaded game doesn't toast a
 459 |         // false level-up on the next turn.
 460 |         _previousLevel = null;
 461 |         RefreshFromWorld();
 462 |     }
 463 | 
 464 |     private void InitHost()
 465 |     {
 466 |         var (session, cts) = PendingHostSessionTransfer.Take();
 467 |         if (session is null)
 468 |         {
 469 |             ErrorMessage = "Host session is missing.";
 470 |             return;
 471 |         }
 472 |         HostSession = session;
 473 |         _hostShutdownCts = cts;
 474 |         _world = session.World;
 475 |         // _saveId was already set via the GameViewModel ctor (the shell
 476 |         // passes it down from NavigateToGameAsHost).
 477 |         GameName = session.World?.Locations.FirstOrDefault()?.Name ?? "Мультиплеер";
 478 |         ShareAddress = $"localhost:{session.Port}";
 479 |         CanSave = true;
 480 | 
 481 |         // Wire session events → UI thread.
 482 |         session.MemberJoined += OnMemberJoined;
 483 |         session.MemberLeft += OnMemberLeft;
 484 |         session.ChatReceived += OnChatReceived;
 485 |         session.ActionQueued += OnActionQueued;
 486 |         session.ActionCancelled += OnActionCancelledHost;
 487 |         session.TurnStarted += OnTurnStarted;
 488 |         session.NarrativeDelta += OnNarrativeDelta;
 489 |         session.NarrativeFinal += OnNarrativeFinal;
 490 |         session.StateUpdate += OnHostStateUpdate;
 491 |         session.TurnEnded += OnTurnEnded;
 492 |         session.TurnFailed += OnTurnFailed;
 493 |         session.BatchCountdownChanged += OnHostBatchCountdownChanged;
 494 |         // Issue #77 — lobby events: member ready toggles + party status
 495 |         // changes (host → Playing). Used to refresh the lobby UI.
 496 |         session.MemberReady += OnMemberReady;
 497 |         session.StatusChanged += OnHostStatusChanged;
 498 | 
 499 |         // Pre-populate the members list with the host + anyone already
 500 |         // connected (no one yet at this point, but defensive).
 501 |         Members.Clear();
 502 |         foreach (var m in session.Members) Members.Add(m);
 503 | 
 504 |         // Seed the host's token counters from the session's cumulative
 505 |         // totals (which were restored from the save on StartAsync). The
 506 |         // per-turn counter stays at 0 — a new host session has no "last
 507 |         // turn" yet.
 508 |         SessionPromptTokens = session.SessionPromptTokens;
 509 |         SessionCompletionTokens = session.SessionCompletionTokens;
 510 |         SessionTotalTokens = session.SessionTotalTokens;
 511 |         LastTurnTokens = 0;
 512 |         RefreshTokenDisplays();
 513 | 
 514 |         // Append a system entry to the log so the user sees something.
 515 |         AppendLog(LogEntry.System($"Хост запущен на порту {session.Port}."));
 516 | 
 517 |         // Issue #77 — initial lobby detection. The HostServer defaults
 518 |         // to Lobby status; the host will transition to Playing via the
 519 |         // StartGameCommand once everyone's ready.
 520 |         RefreshIsLobby();
 521 |         // Notify command CanExecute so the lobby's Start button picks
 522 |         // up the initial ready-state check.
 523 |         StartGameCommand.NotifyCanExecuteChanged();
 524 |         ToggleReadyCommand.NotifyCanExecuteChanged();
 525 |     }
 526 | 
 527 |     private async Task InitClientAsync()
 528 |     {
 529 |         var session = PendingClientSessionTransfer.Take();
 530 |         if (session is null)
 531 |         {
 532 |             ErrorMessage = "Client session is missing.";
 533 |             return;
 534 |         }
 535 |         ClientSession = session;
 536 |         CanSave = false;
 537 |         GameName = "Подключено";
 538 | 
 539 |         // Wire session events → UI thread.
 540 |         session.Welcomed += OnClientWelcomed;
 541 |         session.MemberJoined += OnClientMemberJoined;
 542 |         session.MemberLeft += OnClientMemberLeft;
 543 |         session.ChatReceived += OnClientChatReceived;
 544 |         session.ActionQueued += OnClientActionQueued;
 545 |         session.ActionCancelled += OnClientActionCancelled;
 546 |         session.ActionResolving += OnClientActionResolving;
 547 |         session.NarrativeDelta += OnClientNarrativeDelta;
 548 |         session.NarrativeFinal += OnClientNarrativeFinal;
 549 |         session.StateUpdate += OnClientStateUpdate;
 550 |         session.TurnEnd += OnClientTurnEnd;
 551 |         session.Error += OnClientError;
 552 |         session.Kicked += OnClientKicked;
 553 |         session.LogSynced += OnClientLogSynced;
 554 |         session.Disconnected += OnClientDisconnected;
 555 |         // Issue #77 — lobby events: another member toggled ready, or
 556 |         // the host transitioned the party to Playing. Used to refresh
 557 |         // the lobby UI + IsLobby flag.
 558 |         session.MemberReady += OnClientMemberReady;
 559 |         session.StatusChanged += OnClientStatusChanged;
 560 | 
 561 |         AppendLog(LogEntry.System("Подключено к хосту."));
 562 | 
 563 |         // Issue #77 — initial lobby detection from the WelcomeMsg's
 564 |         // party snapshot. OnClientWelcomed also calls RefreshIsLobby,
 565 |         // but that event may have already fired (race between here and
 566 |         // the GameClient raising Welcomed during ConnectAsync, which
 567 |         // happened in JoinGameViewModel before we got here). Refresh
 568 |         // defensively from the cached Status.
 569 |         RefreshIsLobby();
 570 |         ToggleReadyCommand.NotifyCanExecuteChanged();
 571 |         await Task.CompletedTask;
 572 |     }
 573 | 
 574 |     // ─── Commands ────────────────────────────────────────────────────
 575 | 
 576 |     /// <summary>
 577 |     /// Submit the player's action.
 578 |     /// <list type="bullet">
 579 |     ///   <item>Single-player: run the GM directly, append the narration
 580 |     ///     to the log, save state.</item>
 581 |     ///   <item>Host: enqueue + immediately run ProcessNextTurnAsync so
 582 |     ///     the host sees the result without waiting for an external
 583 |     ///     "Next Turn" button.</item>
 584 |     ///   <item>Client: send ActionQueuedMsg to the host.</item>
 585 |     /// </list>
 586 |     /// </summary>
 587 |     [RelayCommand(CanExecute = nameof(CanSubmitAction))]
 588 |     private async Task SubmitActionAsync()
 589 |     {
 590 |         var text = (CurrentAction ?? string.Empty).Trim();
 591 |         if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(text)) return;
 592 |         CurrentAction = string.Empty;
 593 |         CanSubmit = false;
 594 |         IsWaiting = true;
 595 |         StatusText = "Обработка действия…";
 596 |         ErrorMessage = null;
 597 |         try
 598 |         {
 599 |             if (StandaloneSinglePlayer)
 600 |             {
 601 |                 await RunSinglePlayerTurnAsync(text);
 602 |             }
 603 |             else if (IsHost && HostSession is not null)
 604 |             {
 605 |                 await HostSession.SubmitActionAsync(text);
 606 |                 // The HostSession's batching window (issue #12) drives the
 607 |                 // GM turn: for single-player-host it fires immediately;
 608 |                 // for multi-player-host it waits up to 5s for other
 609 |                 // ready members to submit their actions, then drains the
 610 |                 // queue and runs the GM once on the batch. We do NOT
 611 |                 // call ProcessNextTurnAsync directly here — that would
 612 |                 // defeat the batching window by draining the queue
 613 |                 // before other players' actions could join the batch.
 614 |             }
 615 |             else if (ClientSession is not null)
 616 |             {
 617 |                 await ClientSession.SubmitActionAsync(text);
 618 |                 StatusText = "Действие отправлено хосту.";
 619 |             }
 620 |         }
 621 |         catch (Exception ex)
 622 |         {
 623 |             ErrorMessage = $"Действие не удалось: {ex.Message}";
 624 |         }
 625 |         finally
 626 |         {
 627 |             IsWaiting = false;
 628 |             CanSubmit = true;
 629 |             StatusText = null;
 630 |         }
 631 |     }
 632 | 
 633 |     private bool CanSubmitAction() => CanSubmit && !IsWaiting && !IsLobby && !IsLocalSpectator;
 634 | 
 635 |     /// <summary>
 636 |     /// Send a chat message (lobby chat in multiplayer; in single-player
 637 |     /// this is a no-op since there's nobody to chat with).
 638 |     /// </summary>
 639 |     [RelayCommand]
 640 |     private async Task SendChatAsync()
 641 |     {
 642 |         var text = (ChatInput ?? string.Empty).Trim();
 643 |         if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(text)) return;
 644 |         ChatInput = string.Empty;
 645 |         try
 646 |         {
 647 |             if (IsHost && HostSession is not null)
 648 |             {
 649 |                 await HostSession.SendChatAsync(text);
 650 |             }
 651 |             else if (ClientSession is not null)
 652 |             {
 653 |                 await ClientSession.SendChatAsync(text);
 654 |             }
 655 |             // Single-player: no chat — just clear the input.
 656 |         }
 657 |         catch (Exception ex)
 658 |         {
 659 |             ErrorMessage = $"Не удалось отправить сообщение: {ex.Message}";
 660 |         }
 661 |     }
 662 | 
 663 |     /// <summary>
 664 |     /// Host-only: explicitly save state. The session also saves after
 665 |     /// every turn; this is a manual flush.
 666 |     /// </summary>
 667 |     [RelayCommand(CanExecute = nameof(CanSaveState))]
 668 |     private async Task SaveAsync()
 669 |     {
 670 |         if (!CanSave) return;
 671 |         IsBusy = true;
 672 |         try
 673 |         {
 674 |             if (StandaloneSinglePlayer && _world is not null && _meta is not null && _saveId is not null)
 675 |             {
 676 |                 // Persist session-tokens before the save so the counter
 677 |                 // survives reload.
 678 |                 PersistTokensToMeta();
 679 |                 LogEntry[] snapshot;
 680 |                 lock (_logLock) snapshot = _log.ToArray();
 681 |                 _saveManager.SaveAll(_saveId, _world, _meta, snapshot);
 682 |                 StatusText = "Сохранено.";
 683 |             }
 684 |             else if (IsHost && HostSession is not null)
 685 |             {
 686 |                 await HostSession.StopAsync(); // stops + saves final state
 687 |                 // Restart the session? No — the user can navigate back.
 688 |                 StatusText = "Сохранено.";
 689 |             }
 690 |         }
 691 |         catch (Exception ex)
 692 |         {
 693 |             ErrorMessage = $"Не удалось сохранить: {ex.Message}";
 694 |         }
 695 |         finally
 696 |         {
 697 |             IsBusy = false;
 698 |         }
 699 |     }
 700 | 
 701 |     private bool CanSaveState() => CanSave && !IsBusy;
 702 | 
 703 |     // ─── Lobby commands (issue #77) ──────────────────────────────────
 704 | 
 705 |     /// <summary>
 706 |     /// Toggle the local player's ready state in the lobby. Client-only
 707 |     /// — the host is always Ready (set by HostServer.StartAsync) so
 708 |     /// the command is a no-op for the host (and the lobby UI hides the
 709 |     /// button). For clients, sends a <see cref="MemberReadyMsg"/> to
 710 |     /// the host with the new ready state. The host re-broadcasts to
 711 |     /// everyone (including this client); the echoed msg arrives via
 712 |     /// <see cref="OnClientMemberReady"/> and updates the Members list
 713 |     /// authoritatively. The local Members list is also updated
 714 |     /// optimistically so the UI feels responsive.
 715 |     /// </summary>
 716 |     /// <remarks>
 717 |     /// The "new ready state" is the OPPOSITE of the local member's
 718 |     /// current <see cref="MemberInfo.Status"/> (Ready → Pending →
 719 |     /// Ready). When the local member isn't found in the Members list
 720 |     /// (race during initial connect), defaults to toggling to Ready
 721 |     /// (i.e. assumes the user is currently Pending).
 722 |     /// </remarks>
 723 |     [RelayCommand(CanExecute = nameof(CanToggleReady))]
 724 |     private async Task ToggleReadyAsync()
 725 |     {
 726 |         if (ClientSession is null) return;
 727 |         var local = LocalMemberInfo;
 728 |         bool newReady = local?.Status != MemberStatus.Ready;
 729 |         try
 730 |         {
 731 |             // Optimistic local update so the UI feels responsive.
 732 |             if (local is not null)
 733 |             {
 734 |                 var updated = local with
 735 |                 {
 736 |                     Status = newReady ? MemberStatus.Ready : MemberStatus.Pending,
 737 |                 };
 738 |                 ReplaceMember(updated);
 739 |             }
 740 |             await ClientSession.SetReadyAsync(newReady);
 741 |         }
 742 |         catch (Exception ex)
 743 |         {
 744 |             ErrorMessage = $"Не удалось изменить статус готовности: {ex.Message}";
 745 |         }
 746 |     }
 747 | 
 748 |     /// <summary>
 749 |     /// CanExecute for <see cref="ToggleReadyCommand"/>. Enabled only
 750 |     /// for clients in the lobby (the host is always Ready and doesn't
 751 |     /// get a toggle button). Disabled outside the lobby.
 752 |     /// </summary>
 753 |     private bool CanToggleReady() => IsClient && IsLobby && ClientSession is not null;
 754 | 
 755 |     /// <summary>
 756 |     /// Host-only: transition the party from Lobby to Playing (issue
 757 |     /// #77). Calls <see cref="HostSession.SetStatusAsync"/> which
 758 |     /// broadcasts a StatusChangedMsg to all clients; the resulting
 759 |     /// <see cref="OnHostStatusChanged"/> handler refreshes
 760 |     /// <see cref="IsLobby"/> (the lobby layout disappears, the normal
 761 |     /// game layout appears).
 762 |     /// </summary>
 763 |     /// <remarks>
 764 |     /// Disabled until all non-spectator members are Ready (the host
 765 |     /// is always Ready; clients must have toggled ready). Spectators
 766 |     /// are excluded from the ready-check since they don't submit
 767 |     /// actions.
 768 |     /// </remarks>
 769 |     [RelayCommand(CanExecute = nameof(CanStartGame))]
 770 |     private async Task StartGameAsync()
 771 |     {
 772 |         if (HostSession is null) return;
 773 |         try
 774 |         {
 775 |             await HostSession.SetStatusAsync(PartyStatus.Playing);
 776 |             AppendLog(LogEntry.System("Игра началась!"));
 777 |         }
 778 |         catch (Exception ex)
 779 |         {
 780 |             ErrorMessage = $"Не удалось начать игру: {ex.Message}";
 781 |         }
 782 |     }
 783 | 
 784 |     /// <summary>
 785 |     /// CanExecute for <see cref="StartGameCommand"/>. Host-only +
 786 |     /// lobby-only + all non-spectator members must be Ready. Always
 787 |     /// false outside the lobby.
 788 |     /// </summary>
 789 |     private bool CanStartGame()
 790 |     {
 791 |         if (!IsHost || !IsLobby || HostSession is null) return false;
 792 |         return Members
 793 |             .Where(m => m.Role != MemberRole.Spectator)
 794 |             .All(m => m.Status == MemberStatus.Ready || m.Status == MemberStatus.Playing);
 795 |     }
 796 | 
 797 |     /// <summary>
 798 |     /// Issue #30: Kick a member from the party (host only). Sends KickedMsg
 799 |     /// + closes the connection. The kicked client receives the Disconnected
 800 |     /// event and sees the reconnect overlay (but with a "kicked" reason).
 801 |     /// </summary>
 802 |     [RelayCommand(CanExecute = nameof(CanKick))]
 803 |     private async Task KickAsync(MemberInfo member)
 804 |     {
 805 |         if (HostSession is null || member is null) return;
 806 |         try
 807 |         {
 808 |             await HostSession.KickAsync(member.ConnectionId, "Исключён хостом");
 809 |             AppendLog(LogEntry.System($"{member.Nickname} исключён из партии."));
 810 |         }
 811 |         catch (Exception ex)
 812 |         {
 813 |             ErrorMessage = $"Не удалось исключить: {ex.Message}";
 814 |         }
 815 |     }
 816 | 
 817 |     private bool CanKick(MemberInfo member)
 818 |     {
 819 |         if (!IsHost || member is null) return false;
 820 |         if (HostSession is null) return false;
 821 |         // Can't kick self or the host.
 822 |         if (member.ConnectionId == HostSession.HostConnectionId) return false;
 823 |         return true;
 824 |     }
 825 | 
 826 |     /// <summary>
 827 |     /// Issue #31: True when the local player is a spectator (can see
 828 |     /// everything but cannot submit actions). Drives the action-input
 829 |     /// placeholder + a spectator badge in the UI.
 830 |     /// </summary>
 831 |     public bool IsLocalSpectator
 832 |     {
 833 |         get
 834 |         {
 835 |             if (!IsMultiplayer) return false;
 836 |             var local = LocalMemberInfo;
 837 |             return local?.Role == MemberRole.Spectator;
 838 |         }
 839 |     }
 840 | 
 841 |     /// <summary>
 842 |     /// The local player's <see cref="MemberInfo"/> (looked up by
 843 |     /// connection id). Null when the local member isn't in the roster
 844 |     /// yet (race during initial connect). Used by the lobby UI to show
 845 |     /// the local player's ready state + by <see cref="ToggleReadyAsync"/>
 846 |     /// to decide the new ready state.
 847 |     /// </summary>
 848 |     public MemberInfo? LocalMemberInfo
 849 |     {
 850 |         get
 851 |         {
 852 |             var localId = IsHost
 853 |                 ? HostSession?.HostConnectionId
 854 |                 : ClientSession?.ConnectionId;
 855 |             if (localId is null || localId == Guid.Empty) return null;
 856 |             return Members.FirstOrDefault(m => m.ConnectionId == localId);
 857 |         }
 858 |     }
 859 | 
 860 |     /// <summary>
 861 |     /// Convenience for the lobby UI: the local player's ready state.
 862 |     /// Mirrors <see cref="LocalMemberInfo"/>?.<see cref="MemberInfo.Status"/>
 863 |     /// == <see cref="MemberStatus.Ready"/>. Returns true when no local
 864 |     /// member is found (defensive — defaults to "ready" so the lobby
 865 |     /// doesn't show a misleading "pending" indicator during the
 866 |     /// initial-connect race).
 867 |     /// </summary>
 868 |     public bool IsLocalReady => LocalMemberInfo?.Status == MemberStatus.Ready;
 869 | 
 870 |     /// <summary>
 871 |     /// True when all non-spectator members in the lobby are Ready
 872 |     /// (host is always Ready; clients must toggle). Drives the enabled
 873 |     /// state of the host's «Начать игру» button — recomputed on every
 874 |     /// member ready / join / leave event.
 875 |     /// </summary>
 876 |     public bool AllReady =>
 877 |         Members.Count > 0
 878 |         && Members.Where(m => m.Role != MemberRole.Spectator)
 879 |                   .All(m => m.Status == MemberStatus.Ready || m.Status == MemberStatus.Playing);
 880 | 
 881 |     /// <summary>
 882 |     /// Refresh <see cref="IsLobby"/> from the live session status.
 883 |     /// Called on init + on every status-change event. Single-player
 884 |     /// mode is always false (no lobby phase). Host reads
 885 |     /// <see cref="HostSession.Status"/>, client reads
 886 |     /// <see cref="ClientSession.Status"/>.
 887 |     /// </summary>
 888 |     private void RefreshIsLobby()
 889 |     {
 890 |         bool newIsLobby;
 891 |         if (StandaloneSinglePlayer)
 892 |         {
 893 |             newIsLobby = false;
 894 |         }
 895 |         else if (IsHost)
 896 |         {
 897 |             newIsLobby = HostSession?.Status == PartyStatus.Lobby;
 898 |         }
 899 |         else
 900 |         {
 901 |             newIsLobby = ClientSession?.Status == PartyStatus.Lobby;
 902 |         }
 903 |         if (IsLobby != newIsLobby)
 904 |         {
 905 |             IsLobby = newIsLobby;
 906 |             // Re-evaluate CanExecute for lobby-only commands + the
 907 |             // SubmitAction command (disabled in lobby) when the lobby
 908 |             // state flips.
 909 |             StartGameCommand.NotifyCanExecuteChanged();
 910 |             ToggleReadyCommand.NotifyCanExecuteChanged();
 911 |             SubmitActionCommand.NotifyCanExecuteChanged();
 912 |         }
 913 |         OnPropertyChanged(nameof(LocalMemberInfo));
 914 |         OnPropertyChanged(nameof(IsLocalReady));
 915 |         OnPropertyChanged(nameof(AllReady));
 916 |     }
 917 | 
 918 |     /// <summary>
 919 |     /// Replace a member in the <see cref="Members"/> collection (matched
 920 |     /// by <see cref="MemberInfo.ConnectionId"/>) with a new instance.
 921 |     /// No-op when the member isn't found. Used by the lobby ready-toggle
 922 |     /// flow to update a member's Status in place.
 923 |     /// </summary>
 924 |     private void ReplaceMember(MemberInfo updated)
 925 |     {
 926 |         for (int i = 0; i < Members.Count; i++)
 927 |         {
 928 |             if (Members[i].ConnectionId == updated.ConnectionId)
 929 |             {
 930 |                 Members[i] = updated;
 931 |                 break;
 932 |             }
 933 |         }
 934 |         // Fire change notifications for the derived lobby properties so
 935 |         // the lobby UI re-evaluates the local-ready indicator + the
 936 |         // StartGame button's enabled state.
 937 |         OnPropertyChanged(nameof(LocalMemberInfo));
 938 |         OnPropertyChanged(nameof(IsLocalReady));
 939 |         OnPropertyChanged(nameof(AllReady));
 940 |         StartGameCommand.NotifyCanExecuteChanged();
 941 |     }
 942 | 
 943 |     /// <summary>Leave the game and return to the main menu. Host: stop the
 944 |     /// server (saves final state). Client: disconnect. Single-player:
 945 |     /// save final state if a save id is available.
 946 |     /// </summary>
 947 |     [RelayCommand]
 948 |     private async Task LeaveGameAsync()
 949 |     {
 950 |         IsBusy = true;
 951 |         try
 952 |         {
 953 |             if (StandaloneSinglePlayer && _world is not null && _meta is not null && _saveId is not null)
 954 |             {
 955 |                 // Persist session-tokens before the final save.
 956 |                 PersistTokensToMeta();
 957 |                 LogEntry[] snapshot;
 958 |                 lock (_logLock) snapshot = _log.ToArray();
 959 |                 try { _saveManager.SaveAll(_saveId, _world, _meta, snapshot); }
 960 |                 catch { /* best-effort */ }
 961 |             }
 962 |             else if (IsHost && HostSession is not null)
 963 |             {
 964 |                 try { await HostSession.StopAsync(); } catch { /* best-effort */ }
 965 |                 _hostShutdownCts?.Cancel();
 966 |             }
 967 |             else if (ClientSession is not null)
 968 |             {
 969 |                 try { await ClientSession.DisconnectAsync(); } catch { /* best-effort */ }
 970 |             }
 971 |         }
 972 |         finally
 973 |         {
 974 |             IsBusy = false;
 975 |             _shell.NavigateToMenu();
 976 |         }
 977 |     }
 978 | 
 979 |     /// <summary>
 980 |     /// COMBAT-DEATH (issue #63): reload the current save from disk,
 981 |     /// discarding the in-memory state (which has the dead player). The
 982 |     /// GM is rebuilt from scratch — the conversation history from the
 983 |     /// dead-state session is dropped. The save on disk reflects the
 984 |     /// pre-death snapshot because RunSinglePlayerTurnAsync skips the
 985 |     /// post-turn auto-save when the player just died.
 986 |     ///
 987 |     /// <para>
 988 |     /// Single-player only. Host: no-op (the host owns the save, but
 989 |     /// mid-session reload isn't supported in MVP — the user can leave
 990 |     /// and re-enter instead). Client: no-op (the host owns the world).
 991 |     /// </para>
 992 |     /// </summary>
 993 |     [RelayCommand]
 994 |     private async Task ReloadLastSaveAsync()
 995 |     {
 996 |         if (!StandaloneSinglePlayer)
 997 |         {
 998 |             // Multiplayer modes don't support mid-session reload from
 999 |             // the death overlay in MVP. Just go to the menu — the user
1000 |             // can re-host / re-join.
1001 |             _shell.NavigateToMenu();
1002 |             return;
1003 |         }
1004 |         if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(_saveId))
1005 |         {
1006 |             ErrorMessage = "Сохранение не найдено — не из чего загружать.";
1007 |             return;
1008 |         }
1009 | 
1010 |         IsBusy = true;
1011 |         try
1012 |         {
1013 |             var loaded = _saveManager.LoadAll(_saveId);
1014 |             if (loaded is null)
1015 |             {
1016 |                 ErrorMessage = $"Сохранение {_saveId} не найдено.";
1017 |                 return;
1018 |             }
1019 |             AppendLog(LogEntry.System("Перезагрузка последнего сохранения…"));
1020 |             ApplyLoadedSave(loaded.Value.world, loaded.Value.meta, loaded.Value.log, resetHistory: true);
1021 |             AppendLog(LogEntry.System("Сохранение загружено. Удачи!"));
1022 |         }
1023 |         catch (Exception ex)
1024 |         {
1025 |             ErrorMessage = $"Не удалось загрузить сохранение: {ex.Message}";
1026 |         }
1027 |         finally
1028 |         {
1029 |             IsBusy = false;
1030 |         }
1031 |         await Task.CompletedTask;
1032 |     }
1033 | 
1034 |     /// <summary>
1035 |     /// COMBAT-DEATH (issue #63): leave to the main menu WITHOUT saving
1036 |     /// the current (dead) state. The save on disk is left as-is, so the
1037 |     /// player can pick it up later from the «Загрузить» menu. Differs
1038 |     /// from <see cref="LeaveGameAsync"/> in that the latter saves before
1039 |     /// leaving (we don't want that here — we'd overwrite the pre-death
1040 |     /// save with the dead state).
1041 |     /// </summary>
1042 |     [RelayCommand]
1043 |     private void LeaveToMenu()
1044 |     {
1045 |         // Best-effort: stop the host session if any (no save — we don't
1046 |         // want to persist the dead state).
1047 |         if (IsHost && HostSession is not null)
1048 |         {
1049 |             try { HostSession.StopAsync().FireAndForget(); } catch { /* best-effort */ }
1050 |             _hostShutdownCts?.Cancel();
1051 |         }
1052 |         else if (ClientSession is not null)
1053 |         {
1054 |             try { ClientSession.DisconnectAsync().FireAndForget(); } catch { /* best-effort */ }
1055 |         }
1056 |         _shell.NavigateToMenu();
1057 |     }
1058 | 
1059 |     /// <summary>
1060 |     /// Issue #28: Save the last known world state locally as a new
1061 |     /// single-player save. Called from the disconnect overlay when the
1062 |     /// host has dropped and reconnection failed. The client's cached
1063 |     /// World (from StateUpdate messages) is saved — the player can
1064 |     /// continue solo from the last known state.
1065 |     /// </summary>
1066 |     [RelayCommand]
1067 |     private void SaveWorldLocally()
1068 |     {
1069 |         if (_world is null)
1070 |         {
1071 |             ErrorMessage = "Нет данных мира для сохранения.";
1072 |             return;
1073 |         }
1074 |         try
1075 |         {
1076 |             var profile = _profileStore.GetOrCreate();
1077 |             var meta = _saveManager.CreateSave(
1078 |                 $"{_meta?.Name ?? "Спасённый мир"} (соло)",
1079 |                 _world, profile.Id);
1080 |             // Copy the log if we have one.
1081 |             if (_log.Count > 0)
1082 |             {
1083 |                 LogEntry[] snapshot;
1084 |                 lock (_logLock) snapshot = _log.ToArray();
1085 |                 _saveManager.SaveAll(meta.Id, _world, meta, snapshot);
1086 |             }
1087 |             HasSavedWorldLocally = true;
1088 |             AppendLog(LogEntry.System(
1089 |                 $"Мир сохранён локально как «{meta.Name}». Вы можете продолжить из главного меню."));
1090 |         }
1091 |         catch (Exception ex)
1092 |         {
1093 |             ErrorMessage = $"Не удалось сохранить мир: {ex.Message}";
1094 |         }
1095 |     }
1096 | 
1097 |     /// <summary>
1098 |     /// RECONNECT (issue #7): attempt to re-establish the client WebSocket
1099 |     /// to the same host/port. Tries up to 3 times with a 2-second backoff
1100 |     /// between attempts. On success: clears IsDisconnected (the overlay
1101 |     /// hides); the Welcomed event (raised by ClientSession.ReconnectAsync
1102 |     /// via GameClient.ConnectAsync) refreshes the members list + party
1103 |     /// status from the fresh WelcomeMsg. On all-fail: sets ReconnectFailed
1104 |     /// = true so the overlay switches to the "Не удалось переподключиться"
1105 |     /// exit-only state.
1106 |     ///
1107 |     /// <para>
1108 |     /// Client-mode only. No-op in single-player / host modes (those don't
1109 |     /// have a remote peer to reconnect to — the Leave command handles
1110 |     /// their teardown).
1111 |     /// </para>
1112 |     /// </summary>
1113 |     [RelayCommand(CanExecute = nameof(CanReconnect))]
1114 |     private async Task ReconnectAsync()
1115 |     {
1116 |         if (ClientSession is null) return;
1117 | 
1118 |         CanSubmit = false;
1119 |         IsBusy = true;
1120 |         StatusText = "Переподключение…";
1121 |         try
1122 |         {
1123 |             const int maxAttempts = 3;
1124 |             const int backoffMs = 2000;
1125 | 
1126 |             Exception? lastError = null;
1127 |             for (int attempt = 1; attempt <= maxAttempts; attempt++)
1128 |             {
1129 |                 StatusText = $"Переподключение (попытка {attempt}/{maxAttempts})…";
1130 |                 try
1131 |                 {
1132 |                     // ReconnectAsync re-runs the HelloMsg→WelcomeMsg
1133 |                     // handshake. On success, GameClient raises Welcomed,
1134 |                     // which fires ClientSession.Welcomed, which our
1135 |                     // OnClientWelcomed handler picks up to refresh the
1136 |                     // Members list. We just need to clear the overlay
1137 |                     // state here.
1138 |                     await ClientSession.ReconnectAsync(CancellationToken.None);
1139 |                     IsDisconnected = false;
1140 |                     ReconnectFailed = false;
1141 |                     DisconnectReason = string.Empty;
1142 |                     ErrorMessage = null;
1143 |                     StatusText = "Переподключение выполнено.";
1144 |                     AppendLog(LogEntry.System("Переподключение выполнено."));
1145 |                     return;
1146 |                 }
1147 |                 catch (Exception ex)
1148 |                 {
1149 |                     lastError = ex;
1150 |                     System.Diagnostics.Trace.WriteLine(
1151 |                         $"[GameViewModel] Reconnect attempt {attempt} failed: {ex.Message}");
1152 |                     // Backoff before the next attempt (skip on the last
1153 |                     // attempt — no point waiting before giving up).
1154 |                     if (attempt < maxAttempts)
1155 |                     {
1156 |                         try { await Task.Delay(backoffMs); } catch { /* ignore */ }
1157 |                     }
1158 |                 }
1159 |             }
1160 | 
1161 |             // All attempts failed — switch the overlay to exit-only mode.
1162 |             ReconnectFailed = true;
1163 |             StatusText = null;
1164 |             ErrorMessage = $"Не удалось переподключиться: {lastError?.Message ?? "неизвестная ошибка"}";
1165 |             AppendLog(LogEntry.System(
1166 |                 $"Переподключение не удалось после {maxAttempts} попыток."));
1167 |         }
1168 |         finally
1169 |         {
1170 |             IsBusy = false;
1171 |             CanSubmit = true;
1172 |             // Clear the transient status text — the overlay's own
1173 |             // message takes over the user-facing surface now.
1174 |             if (IsDisconnected) StatusText = null;
1175 |         }
1176 |     }
1177 | 
1178 |     /// <summary>
1179 |     /// CanExecute for ReconnectCommand. The button is only enabled in
1180 |     /// client mode (where the overlay is shown), when a reconnect isn't
1181 |     /// already in flight (IsBusy), and when the previous reconnect
1182 |     /// attempt didn't already exhaust the retry budget (ReconnectFailed).
1183 |     /// </summary>
1184 |     private bool CanReconnect() =>
1185 |         ClientSession is not null
1186 |         && !IsBusy
1187 |         && IsDisconnected
1188 |         && !ReconnectFailed;
1189 | 
1190 |     // ─── Single-player GM loop ───────────────────────────────────────
1191 | 
1192 |     private async Task RunSinglePlayerTurnAsync(string text)
1193 |     {
1194 |         if (_gm is null || _world is null)
1195 |         {
1196 |             ErrorMessage = "Игра не инициализирована.";
1197 |             return;
1198 |         }
1199 | 
1200 |         var profile = _profileStore.GetOrCreate();
1201 |         AppendLog(LogEntry.Action($"{profile.Nickname}: {text}", authorId: profile.Id.ToString()));
1202 | 
1203 |         // Reset the streaming buffer + clear the streaming text so the
1204 |         // user sees only the new turn's live narration. The Progress<T>
1205 |         // callback runs on the captured SynchronizationContext — since
1206 |         // this method is invoked from the SubmitAction relay command on
1207 |         // the UI thread, that's the UI thread. So we can safely mutate
1208 |         // UI-bound state directly in the handler.
1209 |         StartStreamingNarrative();
1210 |         var progress = new Progress<string>(OnNarrativeDelta);
1211 | 
1212 |         NarrativeResult result;
1213 |         try
1214 |         {
1215 |             result = await _gm.ProcessActionAsync(text, progress);
1216 |         }
1217 |         finally
1218 |         {
1219 |             // Final flush: push any remaining buffered content to the UI,
1220 |             // then clear so the streaming TextBlock disappears before the
1221 |             // final narrative LogEntry is appended below. (If we cleared
1222 |             // before the flush, the user would see a brief empty flash.)
1223 |             FlushStreamingNarrative();
1224 |             ClearStreamingNarrative();
1225 |         }
1226 | 
1227 |         if (result.Failed)
1228 |         {
1229 |             AppendLog(LogEntry.System($"Ошибка ИИ: {result.Error ?? "неизвестная ошибка"}"));
1230 |             ErrorMessage = result.Error ?? "Ошибка ИИ.";
1231 |             return;
1232 |         }
1233 | 
1234 |         if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(result.NarrativeText))
1235 |             AppendLog(LogEntry.Narrative(result.NarrativeText));
1236 |         foreach (var tc in result.ToolCalls)
1237 |         {
1238 |             AppendLog(LogEntry.Tool($"{tc.Name}: {tc.Result}",
1239 |                 metadata: new System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary<string, object>
1240 |                 {
1241 |                     ["name"] = tc.Name,
1242 |                     ["args"] = tc.ArgsJson,
1243 |                     ["isError"] = tc.IsError,
1244 |                 }));
1245 | 
1246 |             // Issue #70 — when the GM completes a quest (update_quest
1247 |             // with action=complete), the tool result text is
1248 |             // "Квест «{name}» выполнен. Награда ожидает получения во
1249 |             // вкладке Квесты." Detect this and emit a SYSTEM log entry
1250 |             // telling the player to go claim the reward (the Tool
1251 |             // entry above is somewhat terse + the system entry is
1252 |             // player-facing guidance). Parse the quest name from the
1253 |             // angle-bracketed «…» segment so we can name it in the
1254 |             // notification.
1255 |             if (tc.Name == "update_quest" && !tc.IsError)
1256 |             {
1257 |                 var questName = TryExtractQuestCompletedName(tc.Result);
1258 |                 if (questName is not null)
1259 |                 {
1260 |                     AppendLog(LogEntry.System(
1261 |                         $"Квест «{questName}» завершён! Награда доступна во вкладке Квесты."));
1262 |                 }
1263 |             }
1264 |         }
1265 | 
1266 |         // Accumulate token billing for this turn into the session totals
1267 |         // + last-turn counter, and refresh the top-bar display.
1268 |         AccumulateTokens(result.PromptTokens, result.CompletionTokens, result.TotalTokens);
1269 | 
1270 |         // Increment turn + save.
1271 |         _world.Turn++;
1272 | 
1273 |         // COMBAT-DEATH: when the player just died this turn, do NOT
1274 |         // auto-save. Otherwise the on-disk save would lock the player
1275 |         // into a dead state, and "Загрузить последнее сохранение" from
1276 |         // the death overlay would reload the dead state — defeating the
1277 |         // point. Skipping the save preserves the pre-death snapshot.
1278 |         var playerAfterTurn = _world.ActivePlayer ?? _world.Players.FirstOrDefault();
1279 |         bool playerJustDied = playerAfterTurn is { IsAlive: false };
1280 |         if (_meta is not null && _saveId is not null && !playerJustDied)
1281 |         {
1282 |             // Persist session-tokens into meta before the save so the
1283 |             // counter survives reload.
1284 |             PersistTokensToMeta();
1285 |             try
1286 |             {
1287 |                 LogEntry[] snapshot;
1288 |                 lock (_logLock) snapshot = _log.ToArray();
1289 |                 _saveManager.SaveAll(_saveId, _world, _meta, snapshot);
1290 |             }
1291 |             catch (Exception ex)
1292 |             {
1293 |                 System.Diagnostics.Trace.WriteLine($"[GameViewModel] save failed: {ex}");
1294 |             }
1295 |         }
1296 |         RefreshFromWorld();
1297 |         // Detect a level-up that occurred during this turn and toast it.
1298 |         // Runs after RefreshFromWorld so the character panel already shows
1299 |         // the new level.
1300 |         CheckLevelUpAndToast();
1301 | 
1302 |         // Issue #85: record this turn for replay. Appended after
1303 |         // RefreshFromWorld so the world state snapshot includes all
1304 |         // mutations from tool calls. Persist immediately.
1305 |         if (_replayRecorder is not null && !string.IsNullOrEmpty(result.NarrativeText))
1306 |         {
1307 |             try
1308 |             {
1309 |                 _replayRecorder.RecordTurn(_world.Turn, text, result.NarrativeText, _world);
1310 |                 _replayRecorder.Save();
1311 |             }
1312 |             catch { /* best-effort — don't crash on replay failure */ }
1313 |         }
1314 |     }
1315 | 
1316 |     // ─── Streaming-narrative helpers ─────────────────────────────────
1317 |     //
1318 |     // The streaming-narrative TextBlock at the bottom of the log shows
1319 |     // the GM's narration appear word-by-word as the SSE stream delivers
1320 |     // content deltas. To avoid flooding the UI with PropertyChanged
1321 |     // events (one per delta, potentially dozens per second), we batch
1322 |     // deltas into a StringBuilder and only flush to the bound property
1323 |     // when at least ~50ms have passed since the last flush.
1324 | 
1325 |     /// <summary>
1326 |     /// Reset the streaming buffer + clear the streaming text property.
1327 |     /// Called at the start of each turn.
1328 |     /// </summary>
1329 |     private void StartStreamingNarrative()
1330 |     {
1331 |         _streamBuffer.Clear();
1332 |         _lastStreamFlushTicks = 0;
1333 |         StreamingNarrativeText = string.Empty;
1334 |     }
1335 | 
1336 |     /// <summary>
1337 |     /// Progress callback for streaming narrative deltas. Appends to the
1338 |     /// buffer and throttles property updates to ~50ms intervals.
1339 |     /// </summary>
1340 |     private void OnNarrativeDelta(string delta)
1341 |     {
1342 |         if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(delta)) return;
1343 |         _streamBuffer.Append(delta);
1344 | 
1345 |         var now = Environment.TickCount64;
1346 |         if (now - _lastStreamFlushTicks >= 50)
1347 |         {
1348 |             _lastStreamFlushTicks = now;
1349 |             StreamingNarrativeText = _streamBuffer.ToString();
1350 |         }
1351 |     }
1352 | 
1353 |     /// <summary>
1354 |     /// Push any remaining buffered content to the streaming text
1355 |     /// property. Called at the end of the turn (before clearing) so the
1356 |     /// user sees the final streamed content even if the last delta
1357 |     /// arrived within the 50ms throttle window.
1358 |     /// </summary>
1359 |     private void FlushStreamingNarrative()
1360 |     {
1361 |         if (_streamBuffer.Length > 0)
1362 |             StreamingNarrativeText = _streamBuffer.ToString();
1363 |     }
1364 | 
1365 |     /// <summary>
1366 |     /// Clear the streaming text property (called after the final
1367 |     /// NarrativeResult has been appended to the Log so the streaming
1368 |     /// TextBlock doesn't duplicate the final narrative entry).
1369 |     /// </summary>
1370 |     private void ClearStreamingNarrative()
1371 |     {
1372 |         _streamBuffer.Clear();
1373 |         StreamingNarrativeText = string.Empty;
1374 |     }
1375 | 
1376 |     /// <summary>
1377 |     /// Compare the player's current level against the previously recorded
1378 |     /// baseline; if it went up, emit a system log entry celebrating the
1379 |     /// new level. Then update the baseline. No-op when the player or world
1380 |     /// is missing, or on the very first refresh (where the baseline is
1381 |     /// seeded to the current level rather than a stale value).
1382 |     /// </summary>
1383 |     private void CheckLevelUpAndToast()
1384 |     {
1385 |         if (_world is null) return;
1386 |         var p = _world.ActivePlayer ?? _world.Players.FirstOrDefault();
1387 |         if (p is null) return;
1388 |         int current = p.Level ?? 1;
1389 |         if (_previousLevel is int prev && current > prev)
1390 |         {
1391 |             AppendLog(LogEntry.System($"Новый уровень! Теперь вы {current}-го уровня."));
1392 |         }
1393 |         _previousLevel = current;
1394 |     }
1395 | 
1396 |     private void AppendLog(LogEntry entry)
1397 |     {
1398 |         lock (_logLock) _log.Add(entry);
1399 |         Dispatcher.UIThread.Post(() => Log.Add(entry));
1400 |     }
1401 | 
1402 |     // ─── Refresh displays from the live World ────────────────────────
1403 | 
1404 |     private void RefreshFromWorld()
1405 |     {
1406 |         if (_world is null) return;
1407 |         Dispatcher.UIThread.Post(() =>
1408 |         {
1409 |             // Issue #35: top-bar clock shows the time-of-day label so the
1410 |             // player sees at a glance whether it's day or night (drives
1411 |             // Perception disadvantage + encounter rate). Rendered as
1412 |             // "День 3, 14:00 — день" / "День 3, 22:00 — ночь".
1413 |             ClockDisplay = _world.Clock.ToDisplayWithTimeOfDay();
1414 |             var p = _world.ActivePlayer ?? _world.Players.FirstOrDefault();
1415 |             CharacterSummary = BuildCharacterSummary(p);
1416 |             WorldInfo = BuildWorldInfo(_world, p);
1417 | 
1418 |             // COMBAT-DEATH: refresh the top-bar combat indicator + the
1419 |             // death-overlay flag. CombatDisplay is null when no combat
1420 |             // is active (so the bound TextBlock collapses); otherwise
1421 |             // "⚔ Бой: раунд {round}, ход: {actor}". IsPlayerDead drives
1422 |             // the death overlay (covers the game screen with reload/
1423 |             // leave buttons).
1424 |             if (_world.Combat is { Active: true } combat && combat.TurnOrder.Count > 0)
1425 |             {
1426 |                 var idx = Math.Clamp(combat.CurrentActorIndex, 0, combat.TurnOrder.Count - 1);
1427 |                 var actor = combat.TurnOrder[idx].Name;
1428 |                 CombatDisplay = $"⚔ Бой: раунд {combat.Round}, ход: {actor}";
1429 |             }
1430 |             else
1431 |             {
1432 |                 CombatDisplay = null;
1433 |             }
1434 |             IsPlayerDead = p is { IsAlive: false };
1435 | 
1436 |             // Seed the level-tracking baseline on the first refresh (covers
1437 |             // InitializeAsync + post-load). Actual level-up detection runs
1438 |             // in the single-player / host turn-end handlers, comparing
1439 |             // against this baseline.
1440 |             if (_previousLevel is null && p is not null)
1441 |                 _previousLevel = p.Level ?? 1;
1442 | 
1443 |             // Push the live world into every side panel so the UI stays
1444 |             // in sync after each GM turn / state update.
1445 |             CharacterPanel.RefreshFromWorld(_world);
1446 |             InventoryPanel.RefreshFromWorld(_world);
1447 |             QuestPanel.RefreshFromWorld(_world);
1448 |             WorldPanel.RefreshFromWorld(_world);
1449 | 
1450 |             // Issue #86: check achievement milestones after each refresh.
1451 |             // Newly unlocked achievements get a system log entry (toast).
1452 |             if (StandaloneSinglePlayer || IsHost)
1453 |             {
1454 |                 var newAchievements = AchievementTracker.CheckMilestones(_world);
1455 |                 foreach (var ach in newAchievements)
1456 |                 {
1457 |                     AppendLog(LogEntry.System($"🏆 Достижение: «{ach.Name}» — {ach.Description}"));
1458 |                 }
1459 |             }
1460 | 
1461 |             // Issue #31: refresh IsLocalSpectator so CanSubmitAction
1462 |             // re-evaluates (spectators can't submit actions).
1463 |             OnPropertyChanged(nameof(IsLocalSpectator));
1464 |             SubmitActionCommand.NotifyCanExecuteChanged();
1465 |         });
1466 |     }
1467 | 
1468 |     private void RefreshFromHostWorld()
1469 |     {
1470 |         if (HostSession?.World is { } w)
1471 |         {
1472 |             _world = w;
1473 |             RefreshFromWorld();
1474 |             // Seed the log from the host's in-memory log (post-load).
1475 |             Log.Clear();
1476 |             foreach (var e in HostSession.Log) Log.Add(e);
1477 |         }
1478 |     }
1479 | 
1480 |     private static string BuildCharacterSummary(Player? p)
1481 |     {
1482 |         if (p is null) return "Персонаж: (не создан)";
1483 |         var sb = new System.Text.StringBuilder();
1484 |         sb.AppendLine($"Имя: {p.Name}");
1485 |         if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(p.Race) || !string.IsNullOrEmpty(p.Class))
1486 |             sb.AppendLine($"Раса/класс: {p.Race ?? "—"} / {p.Class ?? "—"}");
1487 |         if (p.Level is int lvl) sb.AppendLine($"Уровень: {lvl}");
1488 |         if (p.Resources.Count > 0)
1489 |         {
1490 |             var hp = p.Resources.FirstOrDefault(kv => kv.Key.Equals("hp", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase));
1491 |             if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(hp.Key))
1492 |                 sb.AppendLine($"HP: {hp.Value}");
1493 |             else
1494 |                 sb.AppendLine($"Ресурсы: {string.Join(", ", p.Resources.OrderBy(kv => kv.Key).Select(kv => $"{kv.Key}={kv.Value}"))}");
1495 |         }
1496 |         if (p.Inventory.Items.Count > 0)
1497 |             sb.AppendLine($"Инвентарь: {string.Join(", ", p.Inventory.Items.Take(8).Select(i => $"{i.Name} ×{i.Quantity}"))}");
1498 |         return sb.ToString().TrimEnd();
1499 |     }
1500 | 
1501 |     private static string BuildWorldInfo(World world, Player? p)
1502 |     {
1503 |         var sb = new System.Text.StringBuilder();
1504 |         sb.AppendLine($"Время: {world.Clock}");
1505 |         sb.AppendLine($"Ход: {world.Turn}");
1506 |         if (p is not null)
1507 |         {
1508 |             var loc = world.GetLocation(p.LocationId);
1509 |             if (loc is not null)
1510 |             {
1511 |                 sb.AppendLine();
1512 |                 sb.AppendLine($"Локация: {loc.Name}");
1513 |                 if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(loc.Description))
1514 |                     sb.AppendLine(loc.Description);
1515 |                 if (loc.Exits.Count > 0)
1516 |                     sb.AppendLine($"Выходы: {string.Join(", ", loc.Exits.Select(e => e.Direction))}");
1517 |             }
1518 |         }
1519 |         sb.AppendLine();
1520 |         sb.AppendLine("Локации мира:");
1521 |         foreach (var l in world.Locations.Take(15))
1522 |             sb.AppendLine($"  • {l.Name} [{l.Terrain}]");
1523 |         return sb.ToString().TrimEnd();
1524 |     }
1525 | 
1526 |     // ─── Inventory action handler ────────────────────────────────────
1527 |     //
1528 |     // The inventory panel raises ItemAction events when the user clicks
1529 |     // use/equip/unequip/drop. We apply them directly to the live World
1530 |     // (single-player + host modes). Client mode is a no-op for now —
1531 |     // item mutations there should route through the host via a future
1532 |     // tool-call message; the panel buttons are hidden for clients
1533 |     // anyway (CanSave=false implies read-only).
1534 |     private void OnInventoryAction(Panels.ItemAction action)
1535 |     {
1536 |         if (_world is null) return;
1537 |         var player = _world.ActivePlayer ?? _world.Players.FirstOrDefault();
1538 |         if (player is null) return;
1539 | 
1540 |         // Find the item: could be in the carried inventory or in an
1541 |         // equipped slot. Unequip operates on equipped; the others on
1542 |         // carried.
1543 |         Item? item = null;
1544 |         string? equippedSlot = null;
1545 |         foreach (var kv in player.Equipped)
1546 |         {
1547 |             if (kv.Value.Id == action.ItemId) { item = kv.Value; equippedSlot = kv.Key; break; }
1548 |         }
1549 |         if (item is null)
1550 |         {
1551 |             item = player.Inventory.Items.FirstOrDefault(i => i.Id == action.ItemId);
1552 |         }
1553 |         if (item is null) return;
1554 | 
1555 |         var template = item.TemplateId is not null
1556 |             ? _world.Registries.Items.Get(item.TemplateId)
1557 |             : null;
1558 | 
1559 |         string logText;
1560 |         switch (action.Kind)
1561 |         {
1562 |             case Panels.ItemActionKind.Use:
1563 |                 logText = ApplyUse(player, item, template);
1564 |                 break;
1565 | 
1566 |             case Panels.ItemActionKind.Equip:
1567 |                 logText = ApplyEquip(player, item, template);
1568 |                 break;
1569 | 
1570 |             case Panels.ItemActionKind.Unequip:
1571 |                 if (equippedSlot is null) return;
1572 |                 logText = ApplyUnequip(player, equippedSlot, item);
1573 |                 break;
1574 | 
1575 |             case Panels.ItemActionKind.Drop:
1576 |                 logText = ApplyDrop(player, item);
1577 |                 break;
1578 | 
1579 |             case Panels.ItemActionKind.Split:
1580 |                 // STACK-SPLIT (issue #64): only stackable items in the
1581 |                 // carried inventory can be split. The InventoryPanel VM
1582 |                 // has already validated this before raising the action,
1583 |                 // but we re-check defensively. The split quantity comes
1584 |                 // in via ItemAction.Quantity (1..item.Quantity-1).
1585 |                 if (template is null || !template.Stackable) return;
1586 |                 if (item.Quantity < 2) return;
1587 |                 logText = ApplySplit(player, item, template, action.Quantity);
1588 |                 break;
1589 | 
1590 |             default:
1591 |                 return;
1592 |         }
1593 | 
1594 |         AppendLog(LogEntry.System(logText));
1595 |         RefreshFromWorld();
1596 | 
1597 |         // Persist immediately in single-player/host modes so the change
1598 |         // survives a reload. Skip in client mode (no save authority).
1599 |         if (CanSave && _saveId is not null && _meta is not null)
1600 |         {
1601 |             // Persist session-tokens before the save.
1602 |             PersistTokensToMeta();
1603 |             _ = Task.Run(() =>
1604 |             {
1605 |                 try { _saveManager.SaveAll(_saveId, _world, _meta, Log.ToArray()); }
1606 |                 catch (Exception ex) { System.Diagnostics.Trace.WriteLine($"[save] {ex.Message}"); }
1607 |             });
1608 |         }
1609 |     }
1610 | 
1611 |     private static string ApplyUse(Player player, Item item, ItemTemplate? tpl)
1612 |     {
1613 |         // Consumable: apply healing/effect, decrement quantity, remove if empty.
1614 |         if (tpl?.Consumable is { } cons)
1615 |         {
1616 |             // Healing: parse "NdM" or plain int; apply to HP resource.
1617 |             if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(cons.Healing))
1618 |             {
1619 |                 var healed = ParseHealing(cons.Healing);
1620 |                 if (healed > 0 && player.Resources.Count > 0)
1621 |                 {
1622 |                     var hpKey = player.Resources.Keys.FirstOrDefault(k =>
1623 |                         k.Equals("hp", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase) ||
1624 |                         k.Equals("health", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase));
1625 |                     if (hpKey is not null)
1626 |                         player.Resources[hpKey] = player.Resources[hpKey] + healed;
1627 |                 }
1628 |             }
1629 |             // Effects: add to the character's active effects (simplified —
1630 |             // a full consumable-effect system would apply timed modifiers).
1631 |             if (cons.Effects is not null)
1632 |             {
1633 |                 foreach (var eff in cons.Effects)
1634 |                     player.Effects.Add(new StatusEffect
1635 |                     {
1636 |                         Id = EntityId.NewId(),
1637 |                         Name = eff.Name,
1638 |                         Description = eff.Description,
1639 |                         Duration = eff.Duration,
1640 |                     });
1641 |             }
1642 |             // Decrement / remove.
1643 |             item.Quantity -= 1;
1644 |             if (item.Quantity <= 0)
1645 |                 player.Inventory.Items.Remove(item);
1646 |             return $"Использован «{item.Name}».";
1647 |         }
1648 | 
1649 |         // Non-consumable "use": nothing mechanical, just log it.
1650 |         return $"Использован «{item.Name}» (без механического эффекта).";
1651 |     }
1652 | 
1653 |     private static string ApplyEquip(Player player, Item item, ItemTemplate? tpl)
1654 |     {
1655 |         // Determine slot from template profile.
1656 |         string slot = tpl?.Weapon is not null ? "weapon"
1657 |             : tpl?.Armor is not null ? "armor"
1658 |             : "misc";
1659 |         // If the slot is occupied, swap the old item back to the inventory.
1660 |         if (player.Equipped.TryGetValue(slot, out var old))
1661 |         {
1662 |             old.Equipped = false;
1663 |             player.Inventory.Items.Add(old);
1664 |         }
1665 |         player.Inventory.Items.Remove(item);
1666 |         item.Equipped = true;
1667 |         player.Equipped[slot] = item;
1668 |         return $"Экипирован «{item.Name}» (слот: {slot}).";
1669 |     }
1670 | 
1671 |     private static string ApplyUnequip(Player player, string slot, Item item)
1672 |     {
1673 |         player.Equipped.Remove(slot);
1674 |         item.Equipped = false;
1675 |         player.Inventory.Items.Add(item);
1676 |         return $"Снят «{item.Name}» (слот: {slot}).";
1677 |     }
1678 | 
1679 |     private string ApplyDrop(Player player, Item item)
1680 |     {
1681 |         player.Inventory.Items.Remove(item);
1682 |         // Drop on the ground at the player's current location.
1683 |         var loc = _world?.GetLocation(player.LocationId);
1684 |         if (loc is not null && _world is not null)
1685 |             _world.SpawnItemOnGround(item, loc.Id);
1686 |         return $"Брошен «{item.Name}».";
1687 |     }
1688 | 
1689 |     /// <summary>
1690 |     /// STACK-SPLIT (issue #64): create a new Item instance with the
1691 |     /// given split quantity, decrement the original stack, and add the
1692 |     /// new stack to the inventory. The new Item gets a fresh EntityId
1693 |     /// (it's a distinct object) but inherits the template, name, weight,
1694 |     /// and enchantments of the original. Returns a one-line log message
1695 |     /// describing the split.
1696 |     /// </summary>
1697 |     /// <param name="player">The active player (must carry <paramref name="item"/>).</param>
1698 |     /// <param name="item">The original stack to split. Must have Quantity &gt;= 2.</param>
1699 |     /// <param name="template">The item's template (used to instantiate the new stack).</param>
1700 |     /// <param name="splitQty">How many units to peel off into the new stack. Clamped to 1..item.Quantity-1.</param>
1701 |     private string ApplySplit(Player player, Item item, ItemTemplate template, int splitQty)
1702 |     {
1703 |         // Clamp the split quantity to a sane range. The InventoryPanel
1704 |         // VM has already validated this, but defensive bounds prevent a
1705 |         // bad client call from emptying the original stack or creating
1706 |         // a negative-quantity item.
1707 |         var qty = splitQty;
1708 |         if (qty < 1) qty = 1;
1709 |         if (qty > item.Quantity - 1) qty = item.Quantity - 1;
1710 | 
1711 |         // Instantiate the new stack from the same template. This carries
1712 |         // over Name, Weight, TemplateId, etc. via EntityFactory.
1713 |         var newStack = EntityFactory.InstantiateItem(template, qty);
1714 |         // Carry over runtime-only fields the factory doesn't set.
1715 |         newStack.Enchantments = item.Enchantments;
1716 |         newStack.CustomDamage = item.CustomDamage;
1717 | 
1718 |         // Decrement the original stack. If splitting leaves it at 0
1719 |         // (shouldn't happen due to the clamp above, but defensive),
1720 |         // remove the original entry entirely.
1721 |         item.Quantity -= qty;
1722 |         if (item.Quantity <= 0)
1723 |             player.Inventory.Items.Remove(item);
1724 | 
1725 |         player.Inventory.Items.Add(newStack);
1726 |         return $"Разделено: «{newStack.Name}» ×{qty} (осталось ×{item.Quantity}).";
1727 |     }
1728 | 
1729 |     /// <summary>
1730 |     /// Parse a healing expression. Accepts plain ints ("5"), NdM dice
1731 |     /// ("1d8"), and "+N"/"NdM" with a leading plus. Returns 0 on any
1732 |     /// parse failure (so a bad template doesn't crash the use action).
1733 |     /// </summary>
1734 |     private static int ParseHealing(string expr)
1735 |     {
1736 |         if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(expr)) return 0;
1737 |         expr = expr.Trim();
1738 |         if (int.TryParse(expr, out var plain)) return Math.Max(0, plain);
1739 |         // NdM
1740 |         var m = System.Text.RegularExpressions.Regex.Match(expr,
1741 |             @"^(?<n>\d*)d(?<m>\d+)$", System.Text.RegularExpressions.RegexOptions.IgnoreCase);
1742 |         if (m.Success)
1743 |         {
1744 |             var n = int.TryParse(m.Groups["n"].Value, out var nn) && nn > 0 ? nn : 1;
1745 |             var sides = int.TryParse(m.Groups["m"].Value, out var ss) && ss > 0 ? ss : 1;
1746 |             if (n > 20) n = 20; // sanity cap
1747 |             int sum = 0;
1748 |             var rng = new Rng(DateTimeOffset.UtcNow.ToUnixTimeMilliseconds());
1749 |             for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) sum += rng.NextInt(1, sides + 1);
1750 |             return sum;
1751 |         }
1752 |         return 0;
1753 |     }
1754 | 
1755 |     /// <summary>
1756 |     /// Try to extract the quest name from an <c>update_quest complete</c>
1757 |     /// tool result. The result text is
1758 |     /// <c>"Квест «{name}» выполнен. Награда ожидает получения во вкладке Квесты."</c>
1759 |     /// — we look for the angle-bracketed <c>«…»</c> segment between the
1760 |     /// leading <c>Квест</c> and the <c>выполнен</c> marker. Returns null
1761 |     /// when the input doesn't match (other update_quest actions, errors,
1762 |     /// foreign-language results, etc.).
1763 |     /// </summary>
1764 |     private static string? TryExtractQuestCompletedName(string? result)
1765 |     {
1766 |         if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(result)) return null;
1767 |         // Match "Квест «{name}» выполнен" — the «…» are guillemets
1768 |         // (U+00AB / U+00BB), not regular quotes. Use a regex with the
1769 |         // actual guillemet characters so the match is locale-agnostic.
1770 |         var m = System.Text.RegularExpressions.Regex.Match(result,
1771 |             @"Квест\s+«([^»]+)»\s+выполнен",
1772 |             System.Text.RegularExpressions.RegexOptions.IgnoreCase);
1773 |         return m.Success ? m.Groups[1].Value.Trim() : null;
1774 |     }
1775 | 
1776 |     // ─── Quest reward claiming (issue #70) ───────────────────────────
1777 |     //
1778 |     // The QuestPanel raises ClaimRewardsRequested when the user clicks
1779 |     // «Получить награду» on a completed quest whose rewards are staged
1780 |     // in Quest.UnclaimedRewards (set by the GM's update_quest complete
1781 |     // tool call). We grant the rewards (currency, XP, items), clear the
1782 |     // UnclaimedRewards field, append a summary log entry, refresh the
1783 |     // panels, and persist. Client mode is a no-op (no save authority —
1784 |     // the panel button is effectively hidden in client mode since the
1785 |     // GM tool flow runs on the host).
1786 |     private void OnQuestClaimRewards(EntityId questId)
1787 |     {
1788 |         if (_world is null) return;
1789 |         var quest = _world.GetQuest(questId);
1790 |         if (quest is null) return;
1791 |         // Defensive: only grant when there actually are unclaimed
1792 |         // rewards. A double-click could fire the command twice before
1793 |         // RefreshFromWorld hides the button; this guard prevents a
1794 |         // double-grant.
1795 |         if (quest.UnclaimedRewards is null) return;
1796 | 
1797 |         var player = _world.ActivePlayer ?? _world.Players.FirstOrDefault();
1798 |         if (player is null) return;
1799 | 
1800 |         var reward = quest.UnclaimedRewards;
1801 |         int currency = reward.Currency ?? reward.Gold ?? 0;
1802 |         int xp = reward.Experience ?? 0;
1803 |         var grantedItemNames = new List<string>();
1804 | 
1805 |         if (currency > 0)
1806 |             player.Inventory.Currency += currency;
1807 | 
1808 |         bool leveledUp = false;
1809 |         int newLevel = player.Level ?? 1;
1810 |         if (xp > 0)
1811 |         {
1812 |             var (leveled, finalLevel) = AwardXpTool.GrantXp(player, xp);
1813 |             leveledUp = leveled;
1814 |             newLevel = finalLevel;
1815 |         }
1816 | 
1817 |         if (reward.Items is { } itemIds)
1818 |         {
1819 |             foreach (var tplId in itemIds)
1820 |             {
1821 |                 var tpl = _world.Registries.Items.Get(tplId);
1822 |                 if (tpl is null) continue;
1823 |                 var inst = EntityFactory.InstantiateItem(tpl, 1);
1824 |                 player.Inventory.Items.Add(inst);
1825 |                 grantedItemNames.Add(inst.Name);
1826 |             }
1827 |         }
1828 | 
1829 |         // Clear the staged rewards so the «Получить награду» button
1830 |         // disappears on the next RefreshFromWorld.
1831 |         quest.UnclaimedRewards = null;
1832 | 
1833 |         // Build a readable summary line. Format:
1834 |         // "Получена награда: 50 зол., 100 опыта, Меч + Кольцо."
1835 |         // Items that don't fit (long lists) get a "+N ещё" suffix.
1836 |         var sb = new System.Text.StringBuilder("Получена награда: ");
1837 |         var parts = new List<string>();
1838 |         if (currency > 0) parts.Add($"{currency} зол.");
1839 |         if (xp > 0) parts.Add($"{xp} опыта");
1840 |         if (grantedItemNames.Count > 0)
1841 |         {
1842 |             // Show up to 3 item names; collapse the rest into "+N ещё".
1843 |             const int maxItemNames = 3;
1844 |             if (grantedItemNames.Count <= maxItemNames)
1845 |                 parts.Add(string.Join(", ", grantedItemNames.Select(n => $"«{n}»")));
1846 |             else
1847 |                 parts.Add(string.Join(", ",
1848 |                     grantedItemNames.Take(maxItemNames).Select(n => $"«{n}»"))
1849 |                     + $" +{grantedItemNames.Count - maxItemNames} ещё");
1850 |         }
1851 |         sb.Append(string.Join(", ", parts));
1852 |         sb.Append('.');
1853 |         if (leveledUp)
1854 |             sb.Append($" Новый уровень: {newLevel}!");
1855 | 
1856 |         AppendLog(LogEntry.System(sb.ToString()));
1857 |         RefreshFromWorld();
1858 | 
1859 |         // Persist immediately so the grant survives a reload. Skip in
1860 |         // client mode (no save authority) — the host's save already
1861 |         // captured the grant on its end.
1862 |         if (CanSave && _saveId is not null && _meta is not null)
1863 |         {
1864 |             PersistTokensToMeta();
1865 |             _ = Task.Run(() =>
1866 |             {
1867 |                 try { _saveManager.SaveAll(_saveId, _world, _meta, Log.ToArray()); }
1868 |                 catch (Exception ex) { System.Diagnostics.Trace.WriteLine($"[save] {ex.Message}"); }
1869 |             });
1870 |         }
1871 |     }
1872 | 
1873 |     // ─── Travel handler ──────────────────────────────────────────────
1874 |     //
1875 |     // The world panel raises TravelRequested when the user clicks an exit
1876 |     // row. We apply it directly to the live World (single-player + host
1877 |     // modes), mirroring OnInventoryAction's pattern: mutate, log, refresh
1878 |     // panels, persist async. Client mode is a no-op for world mutations
1879 |     // (the panel buttons are effectively read-only in client mode since
1880 |     // CanSave is false — travel authority there should route through the
1881 |     // host via a future tool-call message).
1882 |     //
1883 |     // Issue #20 (chunked generation): when the exit's destination doesn't
1884 |     // exist in World.Locations (a phantom exit to a cold region), the
1885 |     // handler triggers WorldBuilderOrchestrator.GenerateRegionAsync on a
1886 |     // background task. A "Генерация региона…" overlay is shown while the
1887 |     // AI call is in flight; on success, the new region's locations are
1888 |     // committed, the phantom exit is removed (replaced by real exits in
1889 |     // CommitLocations on the next refresh), and the world is saved. The
1890 |     // player stays at their current location — they can then click the
1891 |     // new real exit to actually travel into the generated region.
1892 |     private void OnTravel(Panels.ExitRow exit)
1893 |     {
1894 |         if (_world is null) return;
1895 |         if (exit is null) return;
1896 |         if (exit.Locked)
1897 |         {
1898 |             AppendLog(LogEntry.System($"Выход «{exit.Direction}» заперт."));
1899 |             return;
1900 |         }
1901 | 
1902 |         // Strip the "⚠" marker the world panel appends to phantom-exit
1903 |         // destination names (issue #20). The real destination name (the
1904 |         // cold region's name, as set by the committer on the phantom
1905 |         // exit's ToName) is what we look up.
1906 |         var destName = exit.ToName;
1907 |         var phantomMarker = " \u26a0"; // "⚠"
1908 |         var isPhantom = false;
1909 |         if (destName is not null && destName.EndsWith(phantomMarker, StringComparison.Ordinal))
1910 |         {
1911 |             destName = destName[..^phantomMarker.Length];
1912 |             isPhantom = true;
1913 |         }
1914 | 
1915 |         // Find the destination location by display name. ExitRow stores
1916 |         // the destination's display name (resolved in WorldPanelViewModel
1917 |         // from exit.To → world.GetLocation(...).Name). Matching back by
1918 |         // name is robust to entity-id churn across save/load.
1919 |         var destLoc = _world.Locations.FirstOrDefault(l =>
1920 |             string.Equals(l.Name, destName, StringComparison.Ordinal));
1921 | 
1922 |         if (destLoc is null && isPhantom)
1923 |         {
1924 |             // Phantom exit to a not-yet-generated cold region — kick off
1925 |             // region generation. The player stays at the current
1926 |             // location; after generation completes, the world is
1927 |             // refreshed so the new real exits appear.
1928 |             _ = TriggerColdRegionGenerationAsync(destName ?? exit.ToName ?? string.Empty);
1929 |             return;
1930 |         }
1931 | 
1932 |         if (destLoc is null)
1933 |         {
1934 |             AppendLog(LogEntry.System($"Не удалось найти локацию «{exit.ToName}»."));
1935 |             return;
1936 |         }
1937 | 
1938 |         var player = _world.ActivePlayer ?? _world.Players.FirstOrDefault();
1939 |         if (player is null) return;
1940 | 
1941 |         // Mutate the world: move the player, mark the destination as
1942 |         // visited + discovered so it shows up on the map immediately.
1943 |         player.LocationId = destLoc.Id;
1944 |         destLoc.Visited = true;
1945 |         destLoc.Discovered = true;
1946 | 
1947 |         AppendLog(LogEntry.System($"Вы прошли в «{destLoc.Name}»."));
1948 | 
1949 |         // Random encounter hook: dangerous destinations may spawn hostile
1950 |         // NPCs on arrival. Simple inline implementation (the
1951 |         // random-encounters task may later expand this into a richer
1952 |         // subsystem with ambush distance, party size, terrain modifiers).
1953 |         MaybeRandomEncounter(destLoc);
1954 | 
1955 |         RefreshFromWorld();
1956 | 
1957 |         // Persist immediately in single-player/host modes so the change
1958 |         // survives a reload. Skip in client mode (no save authority).
1959 |         if (CanSave && _saveId is not null && _meta is not null)
1960 |         {
1961 |             // Persist session-tokens before the save.
1962 |             PersistTokensToMeta();
1963 |             _ = Task.Run(() =>
1964 |             {
1965 |                 try { _saveManager.SaveAll(_saveId, _world, _meta, Log.ToArray()); }
1966 |                 catch (Exception ex) { System.Diagnostics.Trace.WriteLine($"[save] {ex.Message}"); }
1967 |             });
1968 |         }
1969 |     }
1970 | 
1971 |     /// <summary>
1972 |     /// Trigger on-demand generation of a cold region (issue #20). Shows
1973 |     /// a "Генерация региона…" overlay, calls
1974 |     /// <see cref="WorldBuilderOrchestrator.GenerateRegionAsync"/> on a
1975 |     /// background task (using the save's stashed
1976 |     /// <see cref="SaveMeta.OriginalPlanJson"/>), then refreshes + saves
1977 |     /// on completion. The player stays at their current location — the
1978 |     /// new region's locations are committed with exits connecting back
1979 |     /// to the start region (so the user can click them to actually
1980 |     /// travel in).
1981 |     /// </summary>
1982 |     private async Task TriggerColdRegionGenerationAsync(string regionName)
1983 |     {
1984 |         if (_world is null || _saveId is null || _meta is null) return;
1985 |         if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(regionName)) return;
1986 |         // Don't trigger if we're already generating a region (prevents
1987 |         // double-clicks from spawning parallel AI calls).
1988 |         if (IsRegionGenerating) return;
1989 | 
1990 |         // Reload the meta from disk to pick up the latest OriginalPlanJson
1991 |         // (in case it was patched by a rebuild or another session).
1992 |         var freshMeta = _saveManager.LoadMeta(_saveId) ?? _meta;
1993 |         if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(freshMeta.OriginalPlanJson))
1994 |         {
1995 |             AppendLog(LogEntry.System(
1996 |                 $"⚠ Регион «{regionName}» ещё не сгенерирован, но оригинальный план недоступен — генерация отменена."));
1997 |             return;
1998 |         }
1999 | 
2000 |         // Parse the original plan from the stashed JSON.
2001 |         WorldPlan? originalPlan = null;
2002 |         try
2003 |         {
2004 |             var opts = new System.Text.Json.JsonSerializerOptions
2005 |             {
2006 |                 PropertyNamingPolicy = System.Text.Json.JsonNamingPolicy.CamelCase,
2007 |                 PropertyNameCaseInsensitive = true,
2008 |             };
2009 |             originalPlan = System.Text.Json.JsonSerializer.Deserialize<WorldPlan>(freshMeta.OriginalPlanJson, opts);
2010 |         }
2011 |         catch (Exception ex)
2012 |         {
2013 |             AppendLog(LogEntry.System(
2014 |                 $"⚠ Не удалось разобрать оригинальный план мира: {ex.Message}"));
2015 |             return;
2016 |         }
2017 |         if (originalPlan is null)
2018 |         {
2019 |             AppendLog(LogEntry.System("⚠ Оригинальный план мира пуст — генерация отменена."));
2020 |             return;
2021 |         }
2022 | 
2023 |         IsRegionGenerating = true;
2024 |         RegionGenerationStatus = $"Генерация региона «{regionName}»…";
2025 |         AppendLog(LogEntry.System($"Генерация региона «{regionName}»…"));
2026 | 
2027 |         try
2028 |         {
2029 |             var settings = _settingsStore.Load();
2030 |             if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(settings.Ai.ApiKey))
2031 |             {
2032 |                 AppendLog(LogEntry.System("⚠ Не задан API-ключ — генерация региона невозможна."));
2033 |                 return;
2034 |             }
2035 | 
2036 |             // Build a temporary orchestrator bound to the LIVE world
2037 |             // (not a fresh one). GenerateRegionAsync mutates the live
2038 |             // world in place via the committer.
2039 |             var ai = new AiClient(settings.Ai);
2040 |             var prompts = ServiceHost.Resolve<PromptLoader>();
2041 |             var tools = new ToolRegistry(_world);
2042 |             var orchestrator = new WorldBuilderOrchestrator(
2043 |                 ai, _world, prompts, tools, aiSettings: settings.Ai);
2044 | 
2045 |             var progress = new Progress<WorldBuildProgress>(p =>
2046 |                 Dispatcher.UIThread.Post(() => RegionGenerationStatus = p.Label));
2047 | 
2048 |             var result = await Task.Run(() => orchestrator.GenerateRegionAsync(
2049 |                 regionName, originalPlan, progress, ct: default));
2050 | 
2051 |             if (result.Success)
2052 |             {
2053 |                 if (result.AlreadyReady)
2054 |                 {
