 152 |     [Fact]
 153 |     public void FindEntity_FindsAcrossCollections()
 154 |     {
 155 |         var world = new GameWorld { Rng = new Rng(1) };
 156 | 
 157 |         var loc = new Location { Id = EntityId.NewId(), Name = "loc" };
 158 |         world.AddLocation(loc);
 159 | 
 160 |         var player = new Player { Id = EntityId.NewId(), Name = "player", LocationId = loc.Id };
 161 |         world.SpawnPlayer(player);
 162 | 
 163 |         var npc = new Npc { Id = EntityId.NewId(), Name = "npc", LocationId = loc.Id };
 164 |         world.SpawnNpc(npc);
 165 | 
 166 |         var building = new Building { Id = EntityId.NewId(), Name = "bld", LocationId = loc.Id };
 167 |         world.SpawnBuilding(building);
 168 | 
 169 |         var item = new Item { Id = EntityId.NewId(), Name = "item" };
 170 |         world.SpawnItemOnGround(item, loc.Id);
 171 | 
 172 |         var quest = new Quest { Id = EntityId.NewId(), Name = "quest" };
 173 |         world.Quests.Add(quest);
 174 | 
 175 |         Assert.NotNull(world.FindEntity(player.Id));
 176 |         Assert.NotNull(world.FindEntity(npc.Id));
 177 |         Assert.NotNull(world.FindEntity(building.Id));
 178 |         Assert.NotNull(world.FindEntity(item.Id));
 179 |         Assert.NotNull(world.FindEntity(loc.Id));
 180 |         Assert.NotNull(world.FindEntity(quest.Id));
 181 | 
 182 |         // Names match so we know the index points to the right entity.
 183 |         Assert.Equal("player", world.FindEntity(player.Id)!.Name);
 184 |         Assert.Equal("npc", world.FindEntity(npc.Id)!.Name);
 185 |         Assert.Equal("bld", world.FindEntity(building.Id)!.Name);
 186 |         Assert.Equal("item", world.FindEntity(item.Id)!.Name);
 187 |         Assert.Equal("loc", world.FindEntity(loc.Id)!.Name);
 188 |         Assert.Equal("quest", world.FindEntity(quest.Id)!.Name);
 189 |     }
 190 | 
 191 |     [Fact]
 192 |     public void FindEntity_Nonexistent_ReturnsNull()
 193 |     {
 194 |         var world = new GameWorld { Rng = new Rng(1) };
 195 |         Assert.Null(world.FindEntity(EntityId.NewId()));
 196 |     }
 197 | 
 198 |     [Fact]
 199 |     public void GetPlayer_GetNpc_GetLocation_GetBuilding_GetItem_GetQuest_AllResolve()
 200 |     {
 201 |         var world = new GameWorld { Rng = new Rng(1) };
 202 |         var loc = new Location { Id = EntityId.NewId(), Name = "loc" };
 203 |         world.AddLocation(loc);
 204 |         var player = new Player { Id = EntityId.NewId(), Name = "p", LocationId = loc.Id };
 205 |         world.SpawnPlayer(player);
 206 |         var npc = new Npc { Id = EntityId.NewId(), Name = "n", LocationId = loc.Id };
 207 |         world.SpawnNpc(npc);
 208 |         var bld = new Building { Id = EntityId.NewId(), Name = "b", LocationId = loc.Id };
 209 |         world.SpawnBuilding(bld);
 210 |         var item = new Item { Id = EntityId.NewId(), Name = "i" };
 211 |         world.SpawnItemOnGround(item, loc.Id);
 212 |         var quest = new Quest { Id = EntityId.NewId(), Name = "q" };
 213 |         world.Quests.Add(quest);
 214 | 
 215 |         Assert.NotNull(world.GetPlayer(player.Id));
 216 |         Assert.NotNull(world.GetNpc(npc.Id));
 217 |         Assert.NotNull(world.GetLocation(loc.Id));
 218 |         Assert.NotNull(world.GetBuilding(bld.Id));
 219 |         Assert.NotNull(world.GetItem(item.Id));
 220 |         Assert.NotNull(world.GetQuest(quest.Id));
 221 |     }
 222 | 
 223 |     [Fact]
 224 |     public void Player_Property_ThrowsWhenNoPlayers()
 225 |     {
 226 |         var world = new GameWorld { Rng = new Rng(1) };
 227 |         Assert.Throws<InvalidOperationException>(() => _ = world.Player);
 228 |     }
 229 | 
 230 |     [Fact]
 231 |     public void DefaultWorld_Create_ProducesNonEmptyWorld()
 232 |     {
 233 |         var world = DefaultWorld.Create(seed: 1);
 234 |         Assert.NotEmpty(world.Locations);
 235 |         Assert.NotEmpty(world.Players);
 236 |         Assert.NotEmpty(world.Npcs);
 237 |         Assert.NotEmpty(world.Buildings);
 238 |         Assert.NotEmpty(world.Quests);
 239 |         Assert.NotNull(world.ActivePlayerId);
 240 |         Assert.NotNull(world.Ruleset);
 241 |     }
 242 | 
 243 |     [Fact]
 244 |     public void DefaultWorld_Create_RngStateIsDeterministicBySeed()
 245 |     {
 246 |         // DefaultWorld.Create doesn't roll the engine RNG during construction
 247 |         // (entity IDs are minted via EntityId.NewId, which uses Random.Shared,
 248 |         // not the world's Rng). So two worlds with the same seed have the
 249 |         // same RNG state and produce identical RNG output sequences — even
 250 |         // though their entity IDs / serialized JSON differ.
 251 |         var a = DefaultWorld.Create(seed: 12345);
 252 |         var b = DefaultWorld.Create(seed: 12345);
 253 |         Assert.Equal(a.RngState, b.RngState);
 254 |         Assert.Equal(a.Rng.State, b.Rng.State);
 255 |         for (int i = 0; i < 10; i++)
 256 |             Assert.Equal(a.Rng.Next(), b.Rng.Next());
 257 |     }
 258 | }

  13 | // ─── Location Editor (#92) ───────────────────────────────────────────
  14 | 
  15 | public partial class LocationEditorViewModel : ObservableObject
  16 | {
  17 |     private readonly Location _location;
  18 |     private readonly World _world;
  19 |     private readonly ContentRegistry _registries;
  20 |     private readonly Action _refresh;
  21 | 
  22 |     [ObservableProperty] private string _name;
  23 |     [ObservableProperty] private string _terrain;
  24 |     [ObservableProperty] private int _danger;
  25 |     [ObservableProperty] private string _description;
  26 |     [ObservableProperty] private bool _visited;
  27 |     [ObservableProperty] private bool _discovered;
  28 |     [ObservableProperty] private int? _x;
  29 |     [ObservableProperty] private int? _y;
  30 | 
  31 |     public ObservableCollection<string> Exits { get; } = new();
  32 |     public ObservableCollection<string> AvailableLocations { get; } = new();
  33 |     [ObservableProperty] private string _selectedTargetLocation = "";
  34 |     [ObservableProperty] private string _exitDirection = "север";
  35 | 
  36 |     public LocationEditorViewModel(LocationEditRow row, World world, ContentRegistry registries, Action refresh)
  37 |     {
  38 |         _world = world; _registries = registries; _refresh = refresh;
  39 |         _location = world.GetLocation(row.Id) ?? new Location { Id = row.Id };
  40 |         _name = _location.Name; _terrain = _location.Terrain; _danger = _location.Danger;
  41 |         _description = _location.Description ?? ""; _visited = _location.Visited;
  42 |         _discovered = _location.Discovered; _x = _location.X; _y = _location.Y;
  43 |         RefreshExits();
  44 |     }
  45 | 
  46 |     partial void OnNameChanged(string value) { _location.Name = value; _refresh(); }
  47 |     partial void OnTerrainChanged(string value) => _location.Terrain = value;
  48 |     partial void OnDangerChanged(int value) => _location.Danger = value;
  49 |     partial void OnDescriptionChanged(string value) => _location.Description = value;
  50 |     partial void OnVisitedChanged(bool value) => _location.Visited = value;
  51 |     partial void OnDiscoveredChanged(bool value) => _location.Discovered = value;
  52 |     partial void OnXChanged(int? value) => _location.X = value;
  53 |     partial void OnYChanged(int? value) => _location.Y = value;
  54 | 
  55 |     private void RefreshExits()
  56 |     {
  57 |         Exits.Clear();
  58 |         AvailableLocations.Clear();
  59 |         foreach (var e in _location.Exits)
  60 |         {
  61 |             var toName = _world.GetLocation(e.To)?.Name ?? e.To.ToString();
  62 |             Exits.Add($"{e.Direction} → {toName}");
  63 |         }
  64 |         foreach (var l in _world.Locations.Where(l => l.Id != _location.Id))
  65 |             AvailableLocations.Add(l.Name);
  66 |     }
  67 | 
  68 |     [RelayCommand]
  69 |     private void AddExit()
  70 |     {
  71 |         if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(SelectedTargetLocation)) return;
  72 |         var target = _world.Locations.FirstOrDefault(l => l.Name == SelectedTargetLocation);
  73 |         if (target is null) return;
  74 |         _location.Exits.Add(new LocationExit { To = target.Id, Direction = ExitDirection });
  75 |         target.Exits.Add(new LocationExit { To = _location.Id, Direction = "обратно" });
  76 |         RefreshExits();
  77 |     }
  78 | 
  79 |     [RelayCommand]
  80 |     private void DeleteLocation()
  81 |     {
  82 |         _world.Locations.Remove(_location);
  83 |         _refresh();
  84 |     }
  85 | }

 122 |     partial void OnLevelChanged(int value) => _npc.Level = value;
 123 |     partial void OnDispositionChanged(string value) => _npc.Disposition = value;
 124 |     partial void OnSelectedLocationChanged(string value)

 219 | 
 220 |     public QuestEditorViewModel(QuestEditRow row, World world)

 224 |         _name = _quest.Name; _description = _quest.Description ?? ""; _status = _quest.Status.ToString();

 226 |     }

 231 |     [RelayCommand]

 233 |     {
 234 |         if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(NewObjective)) return;
 235 |         _quest.Objectives ??= new();
 236 |         _quest.Objectives.Add(new QuestObjective { Id = $"obj_{_quest.Objectives.Count + 1}", Description = NewObjective });
 237 |         Objectives.Add(NewObjective);
 238 |         NewObjective = "";
 239 |     }
 240 | 
 241 |     [RelayCommand]
 242 |     private void DeleteQuest() => _world.Quests.Remove(_quest);

 247 | public partial class WorldMetaEditorViewModel : ObservableObject

 249 |     private readonly World _world;

 251 |     [ObservableProperty] private string _title;
 252 |     [ObservableProperty] private string _theme;
 253 |     [ObservableProperty] private string _setting;
 254 |     [ObservableProperty] private string _atmosphere;
 255 |     [ObservableProperty] private string _startingHook;
 256 |     [ObservableProperty] private int _day = 1;
 257 |     [ObservableProperty] private int _hour = 8;
 258 |     [ObservableProperty] private int _minute = 0;
 259 | 
 260 |     public WorldMetaEditorViewModel(World world)
 261 |     {
 262 |         _world = world;
 263 |         _world.Flags ??= new();
 264 |         _title = GetFlag("worldTitle");
 265 |         _theme = GetFlag("worldTheme");
 266 |         _setting = GetFlag("worldSetting");
 267 |         _atmosphere = GetFlag("worldAtmosphere");
 268 |         _startingHook = GetFlag("startingHook");
 269 |         _day = world.Clock.Day; _hour = world.Clock.Hour; _minute = world.Clock.Minute;
 270 |     }
 271 | 
 272 |     private string GetFlag(string key)
 273 |     {
 274 |         if (_world.Flags!.TryGetValue(key, out var v) && v is not null) return v.ToString() ?? "";
 275 |         return "";
 276 |     }
 277 | 
 278 |     partial void OnTitleChanged(string value) => _world.Flags!["worldTitle"] = value;
 279 |     partial void OnThemeChanged(string value) => _world.Flags!["worldTheme"] = value;
 280 |     partial void OnSettingChanged(string value) => _world.Flags!["worldSetting"] = value;
 281 |     partial void OnAtmosphereChanged(string value) => _world.Flags!["worldAtmosphere"] = value;
 282 |     partial void OnStartingHookChanged(string value) => _world.Flags!["startingHook"] = value;
 283 |     partial void OnDayChanged(int value) { _world.Clock = new GameTime(value, Hour, Minute); }
 284 |     partial void OnHourChanged(int value) { _world.Clock = new GameTime(Day, value, Minute); }
 285 |     partial void OnMinuteChanged(int value) { _world.Clock = new GameTime(Day, Hour, value); }
 286 | }

--- src/MyGame.WorldDevKit/ViewModels/MainViewModel.cs (C#, 175 lines, ~1,913 tokens) ---
   1 | using System;
   2 | using System.Collections.ObjectModel;
   3 | using System.Linq;
   4 | using System.Threading.Tasks;
   5 | using CommunityToolkit.Mvvm.ComponentModel;
   6 | using CommunityToolkit.Mvvm.Input;
   7 | using MyGame.Core.Common;
   8 | using MyGame.Core.Saves;
   9 | using MyGame.Core.World;
  10 | using MyGame.Core.World.Content;
  11 | using MyGame.Core.World.Entities;
  12 | 
  13 | namespace MyGame.WorldDevKit.ViewModels;
  14 | 
  15 | public partial class MainViewModel : ObservableObject
  16 | {
  17 |     private World? _world;
  18 |     private ContentRegistry _registries = ContentRegistry.LoadDefault();
  19 | 
  20 |     [ObservableProperty] private string _statusText = "Готово. Создайте новый мир или откройте сохранение.";
  21 |     [ObservableProperty] private string _validationSummary = "";
  22 |     [ObservableProperty] private bool _hasValidationErrors;
  23 |     [ObservableProperty] private ObservableObject? _currentEditor;
  24 | 
  25 |     public ObservableCollection<LocationEditRow> Locations { get; } = new();
  26 |     public ObservableCollection<NpcEditRow> Npcs { get; } = new();
  27 |     public ObservableCollection<ItemEditRow> Items { get; } = new();
  28 |     public ObservableCollection<BuildingEditRow> Buildings { get; } = new();
  29 |     public ObservableCollection<QuestEditRow> Quests { get; } = new();
  30 | 
  31 |     [RelayCommand]
  32 |     private void NewWorld()
  33 |     {
  34 |         _world = new World { Registries = _registries, Seed = 12345, Rng = new Rng(12345) };
  35 |         _world.Flags ??= new();
  36 |         _world.Flags["worldTitle"] = "Новый мир";
  37 |         _world.Flags["worldTheme"] = "fantasy";
  38 |         RefreshEntityLists();
  39 |         StatusText = "Новый мир создан.";
  40 |     }
  41 | 
  42 |     [RelayCommand]
  43 |     private Task OpenWorldAsync() { StatusText = "Открытие мира."; return Task.CompletedTask; }
  44 | 
  45 |     [RelayCommand]
  46 |     private Task SaveWorld()
  47 |     {
  48 |         if (_world is null) { StatusText = "Нет мира для сохранения."; return Task.CompletedTask; }
  49 |         StatusText = "Мир сохранён.";
  50 |         return Task.CompletedTask;
  51 |     }
  52 | 
  53 |     [RelayCommand]
  54 |     private Task ExportWorld()
  55 |     {
  56 |         if (_world is null) { StatusText = "Нет мира для экспорта."; return Task.CompletedTask; }
  57 |         StatusText = "Мир экспортирован.";
  58 |         return Task.CompletedTask;
  59 |     }
  60 | 
  61 |     [RelayCommand]
  62 |     private Task ImportWorldAsync() { StatusText = "Импорт мира."; return Task.CompletedTask; }
  63 | 
  64 |     [RelayCommand]
  65 |     private void SelectLocation(LocationEditRow row)
  66 |         => CurrentEditor = new LocationEditorViewModel(row, _world!, _registries, RefreshEntityLists);
  67 | 
  68 |     [RelayCommand]
  69 |     private void SelectNpc(NpcEditRow row)
  70 |         => CurrentEditor = new NpcEditorViewModel(row, _world!, _registries);
  71 | 
  72 |     [RelayCommand]
  73 |     private void SelectItem(ItemEditRow row)
  74 |         => CurrentEditor = new ItemEditorViewModel(row, _world!, _registries);
  75 | 
  76 |     [RelayCommand]
  77 |     private void SelectBuilding(BuildingEditRow row)
  78 |         => CurrentEditor = new BuildingEditorViewModel(row, _world!, _registries);
  79 | 
  80 |     [RelayCommand]
  81 |     private void SelectQuest(QuestEditRow row)
  82 |         => CurrentEditor = new QuestEditorViewModel(row, _world!);
  83 | 
  84 |     [RelayCommand]
  85 |     private void SelectWorldMeta()
  86 |         => CurrentEditor = new WorldMetaEditorViewModel(_world!);
  87 | 
  88 |     [RelayCommand]
  89 |     private void AddLocation()
  90 |     {
  91 |         if (_world is null) return;
  92 |         var loc = new Location { Id = EntityId.NewId(), Name = $"Локация {Locations.Count + 1}", Terrain = "plains" };
  93 |         _world.AddLocation(loc);
  94 |         RefreshEntityLists();
  95 |     }
  96 | 
  97 |     [RelayCommand]
  98 |     private void AddNpc()
  99 |     {
 100 |         if (_world is null) return;
 101 |         var loc = _world.Locations.FirstOrDefault();
 102 |         if (loc is null) { StatusText = "Сначала создайте локацию."; return; }
 103 |         var npc = new Npc { Id = EntityId.NewId(), Name = $"NPC {Npcs.Count + 1}", LocationId = loc.Id, Disposition = "neutral" };
 104 |         _world.SpawnNpc(npc);
 105 |         RefreshEntityLists();
 106 |     }
 107 | 
 108 |     [RelayCommand]
 109 |     private void AddItem()
 110 |     {
 111 |         if (_world is null) return;
 112 |         var item = new Item { Id = EntityId.NewId(), Name = $"Предмет {Items.Count + 1}", Quantity = 1 };
 113 |         _world.Items.Add(item);
 114 |         RefreshEntityLists();
 115 |     }
 116 | 
 117 |     [RelayCommand]
 118 |     private void AddBuilding()
 119 |     {
 120 |         if (_world is null) return;
 121 |         var loc = _world.Locations.FirstOrDefault();
 122 |         if (loc is null) { StatusText = "Сначала создайте локацию."; return; }
 123 |         var bld = new Building { Id = EntityId.NewId(), Name = $"Здание {Buildings.Count + 1}", LocationId = loc.Id };
 124 |         _world.SpawnBuilding(bld);
 125 |         RefreshEntityLists();
 126 |     }
 127 | 
 128 |     [RelayCommand]
 129 |     private void AddQuest()
 130 |     {
 131 |         if (_world is null) return;
 132 |         var quest = new Quest { Id = EntityId.NewId(), Name = $"Квест {Quests.Count + 1}", Status = QuestStatus.Inactive };
 133 |         _world.Quests.Add(quest);
 134 |         RefreshEntityLists();
 135 |     }
 136 | 
 137 |     private void RefreshEntityLists()
 138 |     {
 139 |         if (_world is null) return;
 140 |         Locations.Clear();
 141 |         foreach (var l in _world.Locations)
 142 |             Locations.Add(new LocationEditRow(l.Id, l.Name, l.Terrain, l.Danger, l.Visited, l.Discovered));
 143 |         Npcs.Clear();
 144 |         foreach (var n in _world.Npcs)
 145 |             Npcs.Add(new NpcEditRow(n.Id, n.Name, n.Race ?? "?", n.Class ?? "?", n.Disposition ?? "?"));
 146 |         Items.Clear();
 147 |         foreach (var i in _world.Items)
 148 |             Items.Add(new ItemEditRow(i.Id, i.Name, i.TemplateId ?? "?", i.Quantity));
 149 |         Buildings.Clear();
 150 |         foreach (var b in _world.Buildings)
 151 |             Buildings.Add(new BuildingEditRow(b.Id, b.Name, b.Description ?? ""));
 152 |         Quests.Clear();
 153 |         foreach (var q in _world.Quests)
 154 |             Quests.Add(new QuestEditRow(q.Id, q.Name, q.Status.ToString()));
 155 |         ValidateWorld();
 156 |     }
 157 | 
 158 |     private void ValidateWorld()
 159 |     {
 160 |         if (_world is null) return;
 161 |         var errors = new System.Collections.Generic.List<string>();
 162 |         if (_world.Locations.Count == 0) errors.Add("Мир не имеет локаций.");
 163 |         if (_world.Locations.Any() && _world.Locations.Count(l => l.Visited) != 1)
 164 |             errors.Add("Должна быть ровно одна стартовая (visited) локация.");
 165 |         HasValidationErrors = errors.Count > 0;
 166 |         ValidationSummary = errors.Count > 0 ? "Ошибки: " + string.Join("; ", errors) : "";
 167 |     }
 168 | }
